```{r}
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=boot_CI_2.5, ymax=boot_CI_97.5)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_point(aes(color=point.color)) + 
  labs(title="", y="DAM propotion change<br>(5xFAD-PLX vs 5xFAD-CTRL)<br>(Log<sub>2</sub> Fold Change)") + 
  scale_color_manual(values=c("|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05"="red", "NS"="black")) + 
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle=30, vjust = 0.7, hjust=.7),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y=element_markdown())

ggsave("publish_new/fig5a.3.pdf", p3, width=1.5738, height=2.2548, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("publish_new/fig5a.3.png", p3, width=1.5738, height=2.2548, dpi=300)

# AI steps:
# 1. Add y-axis title;
# 2. Add x-axis labels.
# 3. Add legend.

```

## Fig. 5d Iba, Clec7a

```{r}

library(readxl)
data <- read_excel("source_data/Figure 5/Figure 5b up.xls")

data.long <- melt(data, variable.name = "treatment")
data.long$treatment <- sub("×", "x", data.long$treatment)
data.long <- na.omit(data.long)

data.long$treatment <- factor(data.long$treatment, 
                         levels=names(group.fill), 
                         ordered=T)

max.val <- max(data.long$value)
upper.limit <- max.val*1.3

p1 <- ggplot(data.long, aes(treatment, value, fill=treatment, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_custom_barplot() + 
   stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX")),
    method = "t.test",
    tip.length = signif_tip_length,
    label = "p.signif",
    family = "Arial", 
    size = signif_textsize, 
    bracket.size = signif_linewidth, label.y = max.val*1.1
  ) + 
  labs(y="CLEC7A<sup>+</sup> cells<br>/mm<sup>2</sup>") + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_comma()) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(NA, upper.limit))

data <- read_excel("source_data/Figure 5/Figure 5b down.xls")

data.long <- melt(data, variable.name = "treatment")
data.long$treatment <- sub("×", "x", data.long$treatment)
data.long <- na.omit(data.long)

data.long$treatment <- factor(data.long$treatment, 
                         levels=names(group.fill), 
                         ordered=T)

max.val <- max(data.long$value)
upper.limit <- max.val*1.3

p2 <- ggplot(data.long, aes(treatment, value, fill=treatment, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_custom_barplot() + 
   stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX")),
    method = "t.test",
    tip.length = signif_tip_length,
    label = "p.signif",
    family = "Arial", 
    size = signif_textsize, 
    bracket.size = signif_linewidth, label.y = max.val*1.1
  ) + 
  labs(y="CLEC7A<sup>+</sup>IBA<sup>+</sup> cells<br>/IBA<sup>+</sup> cells (%)") + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_comma()) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(NA, upper.limit))

p <- p1 / p2

ggsave.plus("fig5b", p, 1.3216, 2.4276)

```

## Fig. 5e: SN Csf1r expression ~ Microglia subtypes

update: New single-nucleus data

```{r}
# fig. 5c: Csf1r expression plot ----
# Csf1r expression plot: barplot

if (F) {
  # dhlab:
  library(Seurat)
  sobj <- readRDS("002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj.rds")
  gene_name <- "Csf1r"  # Target gene
  
  # Method 1: Using FetchData
  expr_vector <- FetchData(sobj, vars = gene_name)[, 1]
  
  dir.create("002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj_expr/")
  saveRDS(expr_vector, "002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj_expr/Csf1r.rds")
}

# thinkpad: 
meta.sn <- readRDS("data_new/meta.sn.rds")
gene.expr <- readRDS("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj_expr/Csf1r.rds")
meta.sn$gene_expr <- gene.expr

# Calculate mean Csf1r expression for each sample
meta.sn.sub <- subset(meta.sn, anno.L2 == "Micro")
gene_expr.agg <- aggregate(gene_expr~treatment+orig.ident+batch + anno.L3, FUN=mean, data=meta.sn.sub)
gene_expr.agg <- subset(gene_expr.agg, anno.L3 %in% c("Micro_0", "Micro_1"))

# Map cell type names
mapping <- c("Micro_0"="HOM", "Micro_1"="DAM")
gene_expr.agg$anno.L3 <- mapping[gene_expr.agg$anno.L3]
gene_expr.agg$anno.L3 <- factor(gene_expr.agg$anno.L3, levels=c("HOM", "DAM"), ordered=T)

# t-test
# HOM <- subset(gene_expr.agg, anno.L3 == "HOM", select=gene_expr, drop=T)
# DAM <- subset(gene_expr.agg, anno.L3 == "DAM", select=gene_expr, drop=T)
# test.result <- t.test(HOM, DAM)

# pair-wise t-test
df.sub <- subset(gene_expr.agg, !grepl("WT_ctrl", orig.ident))
# df.sub.w <- dcast(orig.ident+batch~anno.L3, value.var = "gene_expr", data=df.sub)
# t.test(df.sub.w$HOM, df.sub.w$DAM, paired = T)


p1 <- ggplot(df.sub, aes(anno.L3, gene_expr)) + 
  geom_bar(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    linewidth = geom_linewidth,
    width=.6, 
    fill="grey",
    color="black"
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    stat = "summary",
    fun.data = mean_se,
    width = 0.2, 
    linewidth = axis_linewidth, 
    color="black"
  ) +
  geom_line(aes(group=orig.ident, color=treatment), linewidth=axis_linewidth) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=treatment), shape=21, size=1, stroke=geom_linewidth, fill="white") + 
  labs(y="<b>Expression of <i>Csf1r</i></b>") +
  ylim(c(0, 3.5)) + 
  scale_color_manual(values=group.stroke) + 
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("HOM", "DAM")),
    method = "t.test",paired = T, 
    tip.length = signif_tip_length,
    label = "p.signif",
    family = "Arial", 
    size = signif_textsize, 
    bracket.size = signif_linewidth, 
  ) + 
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
        legend.position = "none", 
        axis.title.y = element_markdown())

ggsave(paste0("publish_new/fig5c.top.pdf"), p1, width=1.2, height=1.433, device=cairo_pdf)
# ggsave("publish/fig5c.bar.pdf", p, device = Cairo::CairoPDF, width=2, height=2, units = "in")

# Csf1r expression plot: UMAP
ct <- "Micro"
sobj <- readRDS(paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/cluster.L3/sobj.", ct, ".rds"))
sobj$UMAP_1 <- NULL
sobj$UMAP_2 <- NULL
if (ct == "Micro") {
  sobj <- subset(sobj, idents=c(0, 1))
}

expr_vector <- Seurat::FetchData(sobj, vars = "Csf1r")[, 1]

p2 <- Seurat::FeaturePlot(sobj, features = c("Csf1r"), pt.size = 0.05, stroke = 0) + 
  scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid="white", high="red", midpoint = median(expr_vector)) + 
  labs(color="") + 
  theme_nature() + 
theme(
  panel.background = element_rect(fill="grey90", color="grey90"),
  plot.title = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks = element_blank(),
  axis.text = element_blank(),
  axis.title = element_text(family="Arial", size=9, face="bold"),
  legend.position = "none", 
)

ggsave(paste0("publish_new/fig5c.bottom.pdf"), p2, width=1.5, height=1.433, device=cairo_pdf)


# ... (skipping some markers code)

# Old code:
# meta.L3_umap <- readRDS("data/meta.L3_umap.rds") # Dependent on fig. 4c data prep.
# umap.Micro_0 <- meta.L3_umap[["Micro_0"]]
# 
# # Get expression and merge with UMAP.
# meta.sn <- readRDS("data/meta.sn.rds")
# gene.expr <- getSNGeneExpression("Csf1r")
# meta.sn$gene_expr <- gene.expr
# ID2expr <- meta.sn$gene_expr
# names(ID2expr) <- row.names(meta.sn)
# umap.Micro_0$gene.expr <- ID2expr[umap.Micro_0$cell_ID]
# umap.Micro_0 <- subset(umap.Micro_0, anno.L3 %in% c("Micro_0_0", "Micro_0_1", "Micro_0_2"))
# 
# # Get center of each cluster for labels.
# library(dplyr)
# label_data <- umap.Micro_0 %>%
#   group_by(anno.L3) %>%
#   summarize(
#     UMAP_1 = median(UMAP_1),  # median x
#     UMAP_2 = median(UMAP_2),  # median y
#     label = unique(anno.L3)  
#   )
# mapping <- c("Micro_0_0"="HOM", "Micro_0_1"="DAM", "Micro_0_2"="Micro_0_2")
# label_data$label <- mapping[label_data$label]
# 
# # Plotting
# p2 <- ggplot(umap.Micro_0, aes(UMAP_1, UMAP_2)) + 
#   geom_point(aes(fill=gene.expr), size=1.5, shape=21, stroke=0.01, color="grey95", alpha=0.4) + 
#   geom_text(
#     data = label_data,          
#     aes(UMAP_1, UMAP_2, label = label),  
#     color = "black",            
#     size = 3,                   
#     vjust = -0.5,               
#     hjust = 0.2
#   ) +
#   scale_fill_gradient(name="<i>Csf1r</i> Expr. ", low = "white", high="red") + 
#   theme_nature() + 
#   theme(axis.text = element_blank(), 
#         legend.title = element_markdown())
# 
# pall <- p1/p2
# 
# ggsave("publish/fig5c.pdf", pall, device = cairo_pdf, width=2.5, height=3)
# ggsave("publish/fig5c.png", pall, width=2.5, height=3, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("publish/fig5c.png")
```

## Fig. 5f: DAM/HOM spatial distribution

```{r}
# fig. 5d DAM/HOM spatial distribution----
gobj.meta <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/microglia_distribution/gobj.meta.log_normalized_expr.csv", row.names=1)
meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")

df.deconvo <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/cell2location2/anno.L3.spot.anno.prop.csv", row.names=1)
row.names(df.deconvo) <- df.deconvo$cell.id
df.deconvo <- df.deconvo[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
meta.st <- cbind(meta.st, df.deconvo[, c("Micro_0", "Micro_1")])

meta.st$Trem2 <- gobj.meta$Trem2
meta.st$P2ry12 <- gobj.meta$P2ry12

# Metadata with centered coordinates. Centering is for coord_flip() use.
corrected_coord <- aggregate(cbind(sdimx, sdimy)~list_ID, FUN=median, data=meta.st)
data <- merge(meta.st, corrected_coord, by="list_ID", suffixes=c(".orgin", ".new"))
data$sdimx <- data$sdimx.orgin - data$sdimx.new
data$sdimy <- data$sdimy.orgin - data$sdimy.new

p.list <- list()

interested_cts <- c("Micro_0", "Micro_1", "P2ry12", "Trem2")

data.sub <- subset(data, list_ID=="5xFAD-CTRL-2")

# Fixed spot size, requires geom_circle, which is slow.
for (ct in interested_cts) {
  data.ct <- data.sub[, c("sdimx", "sdimy", ct)]
  colnames(data.ct) <- c("sdimx", "sdimy", "abundance")
  upper <- boxplot(data.ct$abundance, plot = F)$stats[5]
  middle <- boxplot(data.ct$abundance, plot = F)$stats[3]
  lower <- boxplot(data.ct$abundance, plot = F)$stats[1]
  data.ct$abundance[data.ct$abundance > upper] <- upper
  data.ct$abundance[data.ct$abundance < lower] <- lower
  p <- ggplot(data.ct, aes(sdimx, sdimy)) + 
    #geom_circle(aes(x0 = sdimx, y0 = sdimy, r=55, fill=abundance), color = NA) +
    geom_point(aes(color=abundance), size=.05) + 
    # scale_fill_gradientn(colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
    #                      values=scales::rescale(c(0, median.expr, max.expr))) + 
    scale_color_gradientn(colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
                          values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper))) + 
    labs(title=ct) + 
    coord_fixed() + 
    theme_nature() + 
    theme(panel.background=element_blank(), panel.grid=element_blank(),
          axis.title=element_blank(), 
          axis.text=element_blank(), 
          axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
          legend.position = "none", 
          axis.line.x = element_blank(), 
          axis.line.y = element_blank(), 
          plot.title = element_blank())
  
  p.list[[ct]] <- p
}

pall <- patchwork::wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=2)

ggsave("publish_new/Fig5d.png", pall, width=5.96, height=3.43, 
       units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

## Fig. 5g: Aβ index \~ P2ry12, Trem2

```{r}
# fig. 5e ----

# Aβ index ~ Trem2/Tmem119
gobj.meta <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/microglia_distribution/gobj.meta.log_normalized_expr.csv", row.names=1)
meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")
meta.st$Trem2 <- gobj.meta$Trem2
meta.st$P2ry12 <- gobj.meta$P2ry12

meta.st$Abeta_index <- gobj.meta$Abeta_index

meta.st.sub <- subset(meta.st, 
                      treatment != "WT-CTRL", 
                      select=c("treatment", "Abeta_index", "Trem2", "P2ry12"))

meta.st.sub.long <- melt(meta.st.sub, 
                         id.vars = c("treatment", "Abeta_index"), 
                         measure.vars = c("Trem2", "P2ry12"), 
                         variable.name = "gene", value.name = "expression")
if (F) {
  # 旧版式
  p <- ggplot(meta.st.sub.long, aes(Abeta_index, expression, group=treatment, color=treatment)) + 
  labs(x="Aβ index", 
       y=paste0("<b>Gene expression<br>(Log-normalized counts)</b>")) + 
  geom_smooth(method="lm") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = group.fill) + 
  facet_wrap(gene~., scale="free_y", ncol=1) +   
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(axis.title.y = element_markdown(), 
        legend.position = "top", 
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold.italic"), 
        legend.title=element_blank(), 
        legend.direction = "horizontal")
  
  for (i in c("main", "alt")) {
    if (i == "main") {
      p <- p + geom_point(shape=21, fill=NA, alpha=.3)
      ggsave("publish/Fig5e.pdf", p, width=2.6776, height=4.6179, device=cairo_pdf) 
      ggsave("publish/Fig5e.png", p, width=2.6776, height=4.6179, dpi=300)
    } else {
      p <- p + stat_cor(size=9 * 0.35278) 
      ggsave("publish/Fig5e.alt.pdf", p, width=2.3175, height=3.6388, device=cairo_pdf)
      ggsave("publish/Fig5e.alt.png", p, width=2.3175, height=3.6388, dpi=300)
    }
  }
}

p.list <- list()

for (Gene in c("Trem2", "P2ry12")) {
  
  data <- subset(meta.st.sub.long, gene == Gene)
  y_axis.title <- paste0("<b><i>", Gene, "</i> expression<br>(Log-normalized counts)</b>")
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(Abeta_index, expression, group=treatment, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_point(shape=21, fill=NA, size=1) + 
  labs(x="Aβ index", 
       y=y_axis.title) + 
  geom_smooth(method="lm") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = group.stroke) + 
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(axis.title.y = element_markdown(), 
        legend.position = "bottom", 
        legend.title=element_blank(), 
        legend.direction = "horizontal")
  
  if (Gene == "Trem2") {
    p <- p + theme(legend.position = "none", axis.title.x=element_blank())
  }
  
  p.list[[Gene]] <- p
}

p <- p.list[[1]] / p.list[[2]]

ggsave("publish_new/Fig5e.pdf", p, width=2.5, height=4.6179, device=cairo_pdf) 
ggsave("publish_new/Fig5e.png", p, width=2.5, height=4.6179, dpi=300)

```
## ---

## Fig. 6 Proportion plots

1. responsive and non-responsive
2. responsive divided into up and down
2. up divided into rescued and non-rescued
3. up divided into mt-encoded and nucleus-encoded

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

mgi_db <- readxl::read_excel("C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/database/MGI/GO0006119.xlsx")
st.DEGs <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/st.DEGs.csv", row.names=1)
st.DEGs.sub <- subset(st.DEGs, comparison == "PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl")
st.DEGs.up <- subset(st.DEGs.sub, avg_log2FC > 0)
st.DEGs.down <- subset(st.DEGs.sub, avg_log2FC < 0)

rescued.df <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/st.DEGs.rescued.csv", row.names=1)

df <- data.frame(gene=unique(mgi_db$Symbol), class="ns")
df$class[df$gene %in% st.DEGs.up$gene] <- "up"
df$class[df$gene %in% st.DEGs.down$gene] <- "down/up_down"

df$respon <- ifelse(df$class=="ns", "non-responsive", "responsive")

df.agg <- aggregate(gene~class, FUN=length, data=df)

p <- ggplot(df.agg, aes(x="", y=gene, fill=class)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position="fill") + coord_polar("y", start = 0) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("down/up_down"="blue", "up"="red", "ns"="grey")) + 
  theme_void() + theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "vertical")

df.up <- subset(df, class== "up")
df.up$location <- ifelse(grepl("^mt-", df.up$gene), "mt", "nu")
df.up$rescued <- ifelse(df.up$gene %in% rescued.df$gene, "rescued", "non-rescued")

df.up.agg1 <- aggregate(gene~location, FUN=length, data=df.up)
p1 <- ggplot(df.up.agg1, aes(x="", y=gene, fill=location)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position="fill") + coord_polar("y", start = 0) + theme_void()+ theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "vertical")

df.up.agg2 <- aggregate(gene~rescued, FUN=length, data=df.up)
p2 <- ggplot(df.up.agg2, aes(x="", y=gene, fill=rescued)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position="fill") + coord_polar("y", start = 0) + theme_void()+ theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "vertical")

pall <- p | p1 | p2

ggsave("publish_new/fig6.oxphos_proportion.pdf", pall, width=3.98, height=2.34, device=cairo_pdf)
```


## Fig. 6a OXPHOS ST DEGs heatmap





Previously generated with shinyapp, might need adjustment now.





```{r}


library(reshape2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)

spot.DEGs <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/st.DEGs.csv", row.names=1)
cell.DEGs <- read.csv("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/anno.L1.FindAllMarkers.csv", row.names=1)

Abeta.merged <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/delta_Abeta.csv", row.names=1)
br.order <- rev(Abeta.merged$brain_region)
br.order <- br.order[!grepl("Ventricle", br.order)]


only_PL_vs_AD <- TRUE

mgi_db <- readxl::read_excel("C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/database/MGI/GO0006119.xlsx")

st.DEGs <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/st.DEGs.csv", row.names=1)
st.DEGs.sub <- subset(st.DEGs, comparison == "PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl")
st.DEGs.up <- subset(st.DEGs.sub, avg_log2FC > 0)
st.DEGs.down <- subset(st.DEGs.sub, avg_log2FC < 0)

rescued.df <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/st.DEGs.rescued.csv", row.names=1)

df <- data.frame(gene=unique(mgi_db$Symbol), class="ns")
df$class[df$gene %in% st.DEGs.up$gene] <- "up"
df$class[df$gene %in% st.DEGs.down$gene] <- "down/up_down"

df$respon <- ifelse(df$class=="ns", "non-responsive", "responsive")

sub_dat <- subset(spot.DEGs, gene %in% df$gene[df$respon == "responsive"] & 
                  comparison %in% c("FADCtrl_vs_WTCtrl", "PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl"))

available_regions <- unique(sub_dat$brain_region)
sorted_regions <- br.order[br.order %in% available_regions]

if (only_PL_vs_AD) {
  all_genes <- unique(subset(sub_dat, comparison == "PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl")$gene)
} else {
  all_genes <- unique(sub_dat$gene)
}

get_matrix <- function(comp_name) {
  tmp <- dcast(subset(sub_dat, comparison == comp_name), 
               gene ~ brain_region, value.var = "avg_log2FC", fill = 0)
  rownames(tmp) <- tmp$gene
  tmp <- tmp[, -1]
  

  res <- matrix(0, nrow = length(all_genes), ncol = length(sorted_regions), 
                dimnames = list(all_genes, sorted_regions)) 
  
  common_g <- intersect(rownames(tmp), all_genes)
  common_r <- intersect(colnames(tmp), sorted_regions)
  
  if(length(common_g) > 0 && length(common_r) > 0){
    res[common_g, common_r] <- as.matrix(tmp[common_g, common_r])
  }
  
  res <- res[, sorted_regions, drop=FALSE]
  return(res)
}

mat_AD <- get_matrix("FADCtrl_vs_WTCtrl")
mat_PL <- get_matrix("PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl")

mat_final <- cbind(mat_AD, mat_PL)

colnames(mat_final) <- c(paste0("AD_", sorted_regions), paste0("PL_", sorted_regions))
sorted_regions.renamed <- sub("Olfactory area", "Olfactory cortical area", sorted_regions)


row_max <- apply(abs(mat_final), 1, max)
row_max[row_max == 0] <- 1 
mat_scaled <- mat_final / row_max


gene_dist <- dist(mat_scaled, method = "euclidean")
gene_hclust <- hclust(gene_dist, method = "complete")

gene_clusters <- cutree(gene_hclust, k = 6)

mat_scaled <- mat_scaled[gene_hclust$order, ]

st.DEGs.rescued <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/st.DEGs.rescued.csv", row.names=1)

library(dplyr)
result <- st.DEGs.rescued %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  summarise(direction = paste(unique(direction), collapse = ","))

result2 <- subset(result, direction=="down rescued" | direction=="up rescued")
result2 <- data.frame(result2)
row.names(result2) <- result2$gene

anno_row <- data.frame(Rescued=result2[rownames(mat_scaled), "direction"], row.names=rownames(mat_scaled))
anno_row$Rescued[is.na(anno_row$Rescued)] <- "None"

anno_colors <- list(Rescued=c("None"="grey", "up rescued"="red", "down rescued"="blue"))

my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(100)

p <- pheatmap(mat_scaled,
         cluster_rows = F, 
         cluster_cols = FALSE, 
         color = my_colors, 
         breaks = seq(-1, 1, length.out = 101), 
         annotation_row = anno_row, 
         annotation_legend = FALSE, 
         annotation_colors = anno_colors,
         gaps_col = length(sorted_regions), 
         labels_col = rep(sorted_regions.renamed, 2),
         show_rownames = T, 
         main = paste0("Transcriptional alterations of PLX-responsive \nOXPHOS genes across comparisons"),  
         fontsize_row=8, 
         fontsize_col=8, 
         silent = T
)

library(grid)
idx <- grep("row_names", p$gtable$layout$name)
p$gtable$grobs[[idx]]$gp <- gpar(fontface = "italic", fontsize=8)

idx <- grep("main", p$gtable$layout$name)
p$gtable$grobs[[idx]]$gp <- gpar(fontsize=8)

width=3.68
height=6

out.path <- paste0("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/OXPHOS_ST_DEGs_heatmap.pdf")
cairo_pdf(out.path, width, height, family = "Arial")
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(p$gtable)
dev.off()

windowsFonts(Arial = windowsFont("Arial")) 
out.path <- paste0("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/OXPHOS_ST_DEGs_heatmap.png")
png(out.path, width, height, family = "Arial", units = "in", res=300)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(p$gtable)
dev.off()

```





## Fig. 6b OXPHOS genes Scheme

使用biorender绘制。

## Fig. 6e ROSMAP AD vs Normal GSEAplot

```{r}
# code: C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622/202others.Rmd#rosmap-bulk-ad-vs-wt-gseaplot-pdf
# file: C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/database/rosmap_bulk/rosmap/rosmap.bulk.AD_vs_WT.gseaplot.pdf
```

## Fig. 6g mt-Nd1 experimental validation

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(rstatix)
data <- read_excel("source_data/Figure 6E.xls")

data.long <- melt(data, id.vars = "Brain_region", variable.name = "treatment")
data.long$treatment <- sub("×", "x", data.long$treatment)
data.long$treatment <- sub("\\.\\.\\.\\d+$", "", data.long$treatment, perl=T)
data.long$treatment <- factor(data.long$treatment, 
                         levels=names(group.fill), 
                         ordered=T)

upper.limit <- max(data.long$value)*1.3
if (F) {
  # Use t-test
  p <- ggplot(data.long, aes(treatment, value, fill=treatment, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_custom_barplot() + 
  stat_compare_means(
  comparisons = list(c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-CTRL"), 
                   c("5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX"), 
                   c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX")),
  method = "t.test",
  tip.length = signif_tip_length,
  label = "p.signif",
  family = "Arial", 
  size = signif_textsize, 
  bracket.size = signif_linewidth, 
  step.increase = 0.15
  ) + 
  facet_wrap(.~Brain_region) + 
  labs(y="<b>Relative <i>mt-Nd1</i> expression level</b>") + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_comma()) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(NA, upper.limit))
} else {
  # Use ANOVA
  
  tukey <- data.long %>% 
    group_by(Brain_region) %>%
    tukey_hsd(value ~ treatment)
  
  tukey$comparison <- paste0(tukey$group1, "_vs_", tukey$group2)
  tukey$comparison <- factor(tukey$comparison, levels=c("WT-CTRL_vs_5xFAD-CTRL",
                                                        "5xFAD-CTRL_vs_5xFAD-PLX",
                                                        "WT-CTRL_vs_5xFAD-PLX"), ordered=T)
  tukey  <- tukey[order(tukey$Brain_region, tukey$comparison), ]
  
  tukey <- tukey %>% add_xy_position(x = "treatment", step.increase = 0.15)
  
  p <- ggplot(data.long,
              aes(treatment, value, fill = treatment, color = treatment)) +
    geom_custom_barplot() +
    stat_pvalue_manual(tukey, label = "p.adj.signif", tip.length = 0, 
                       family="Arial", size=signif_textsize, 
                       bracket.size = signif_linewidth) + 
    facet_wrap(. ~ Brain_region) +
    labs(y = "<b>Relative <i>mt-Nd1</i> expression level</b>") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_comma()) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(NA, upper.limit))
}

ggsave("publish/fig6f.pdf", p, width=2.9712, height=2.2, device=cairo_pdf)
ggsave("publish/fig6f.png", p, width=2.9712, height=2.2, dpi=300)

# Manually label PL vs AD in Isocortex:
b <- subset(data.long, Brain_region=="Isocortex" & treatment == "5xFAD-CTRL")$value
a <- subset(data.long, Brain_region=="Isocortex" & treatment == "5xFAD-PLX")$value

t.test(a, b, var.equal = T)
# 	Welch Two Sample t-test
# 
# data:  a and b
# t = 2.531, df = 2.9078, p-value = 0.088
# ...

if (F) {
  # For testing
  # Use ANOVA
  library(ggpubr)

  # data.long.sub <- subset(data.long, Brain_region == "Isocortex")
  tukey <- data.long %>% 
    group_by(Brain_region) %>%
    tukey_hsd(value ~ treatment) %>% 
    add_xy_position(x = "treatment", step.increase = 0.1)
  
  # Plot boxplot or other
  ggboxplot(data.long, x = "treatment", y = "value", facet.by = "Brain_region") +
    stat_pvalue_manual(tukey, label = "p.adj.signif", tip.length = 0.01)
}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("publish/fig6f.png")
```

## ---

## Fig. 6 Ext. a Spatial co-expression network

```{r}
# Reference: C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622/spatial_coexpression.Rmd## Describe modules
# keyword: RunModuleUMAP
# Processed with Adobe Illustrator.
# Saved as: "C:\Users\a8799\Desktop\project\2022-10-14_mouse_spatial\manuscript\figure_process\raw\Fig6\PLX5622.ModuleUMAPPlot_v2_label.ai"
```


## Fig. 6 Ext. b module-trait correlation

todo:

1. Heatmap: mark significance only when correlation coefficient exceeds a specific threshold.
2. Show only PL12 and PL14 on the main figure.

```{r}
# code: C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622/spatial_coexpression.Rmd
# output: 
out.path <- paste0("../001ST/001Giotto_out/007spatial_coexpr/hdWGCNA/cell_cor/", 
                   LEVEL, ".", treatment, ".ModuleTraitCorrelation.pdf" )

LEVEL <- "anno.L2"
in.path <- paste0("../001ST/001Giotto_out/007spatial_coexpr/hdWGCNA/cell_cor/mt_cor.list.", LEVEL, ".rds")

mt_cor.list <- readRDS(in.path)

treatment <- "PLX5622"
df.cor <- mt_cor.list[[treatment]]$cor$all_cells
df.fdr <- mt_cor.list[[treatment]]$fdr$all_cells

# pak::pkg_install("ComplexHeatmap")
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

# Draw heatmap and add significance marks
global_gp <- gpar(fontsize = 9, fontfamily = "Arial")

p <- Heatmap(df.cor,
        name = "Correlation coefficient",
        cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
            # Add asterisks based on p-value
            if(df.fdr[i, j] < 0.001 & df.cor[i, j] > 0.2) {
                grid.text("*", x, y, gp =global_gp )
            } 
          }, 
        row_names_gp = global_gp,
        column_names_gp = global_gp,
        row_title_gp = global_gp,
        column_title_gp = global_gp,
        
        # Legend also uses same settings
        heatmap_legend_param = list(
            title_gp = global_gp,
            labels_gp = global_gp
        ))

cairo_pdf("publish_new/Fig6e.full.pdf", width = 4.64, height = 3.54)
draw(p)
dev.off()

# Show only PL12 and PL14
```



## Fig. 6 Ext. Spatial distribution comparison of PL12 and PL14

Original Fig. 7d

Moved from Fig. 7h to Fig 6. Placement in main or extended figure to be determined.

```{r}
# Fig. 7d Spatial distribution of OXPHOS-related spatial co-expression modules----
# Reference fig 4c right code
library(dplyr)

MEs.list <- readRDS("../001ST/001Giotto_out/007spatial_coexpr/hdWGCNA/MEs.list.rds")
meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")

df.deconvo <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/cell2location2/anno.L2.spot.anno.prop.csv", row.names=1)
row.names(df.deconvo) <- df.deconvo$cell.id
df.deconvo <- df.deconvo[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
meta.st <- cbind(meta.st, df.deconvo[, c("GABA_1", "Glu_5", "Astro", "Endo.Others")])

MEs.WT <- data.frame(cell_ID = row.names(MEs.list$df.MEs.WT), 
                     WT14 = MEs.list$df.MEs.WT$WT14)

MEs.PL <- data.frame(cell_ID = row.names(MEs.list$df.MEs.PL), 
                    PL12 = MEs.list$df.MEs.PL$PL12, 
                    PL14 = MEs.list$df.MEs.PL$PL14)

# Metadata with centered coordinates. Centering is for coord_fixed() use.
corrected_coord <- aggregate(cbind(sdimx, sdimy)~list_ID, FUN=median, data=meta.st)
data <- merge(meta.st, corrected_coord, by="list_ID", suffixes=c(".orgin", ".new"))
data$sdimx <- data$sdimx.orgin - data$sdimx.new
data$sdimy <- data$sdimy.orgin - data$sdimy.new

p.list <- list()

interested_cts <- c("PL12", "GABA_1", "Glu_5", "PL14", "Astro", "Endo.Others")

# Fixed spot size, requires geom_circle, which is slow.
for (ct in interested_cts) {
  if (ct == "WT14") {
    data.sub <- data %>% 
      filter(treatment == "WT-CTRL" & batch == 2) %>%
      inner_join(MEs.WT, by = "cell_ID")
  } else {
    data.sub <- data %>% 
      filter(treatment == "5xFAD-PLX" & batch == 1) %>%
      inner_join(MEs.PL, by = "cell_ID")
  }
  data.ct <- data.sub[, c("sdimx", "sdimy", ct)]
  colnames(data.ct) <- c("sdimx", "sdimy", "abundance")
  upper <- boxplot(data.ct$abundance, plot = F)$stats[5]
  middle <- boxplot(data.ct$abundance, plot = F)$stats[3]
  lower <- boxplot(data.ct$abundance, plot = F)$stats[1]
  data.ct$abundance[data.ct$abundance > upper] <- upper
  data.ct$abundance[data.ct$abundance < lower] <- lower
  p <- ggplot(data.ct, aes(sdimx, sdimy)) + 
    #geom_circle(aes(x0 = sdimx, y0 = sdimy, r=55, fill=abundance), color = NA) +
    geom_point(aes(color=abundance), size=.05) + 
    # scale_fill_gradientn(colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
    #                      values=scales::rescale(c(0, median.expr, max.expr))) + 
    scale_color_gradientn(colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
                         values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper))) + 
    labs(title=ct) + 
    coord_fixed() + 
    theme_nature() + 
    theme(panel.background=element_blank(), panel.grid=element_blank(),
          axis.title=element_blank(), 
          axis.text=element_blank(), 
          axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
          legend.position = "none", 
          axis.line.x = element_blank(), 
          axis.line.y = element_blank(), 
          plot.title = element_blank())
  
  p.list[[ct]] <- p
}

pall <- patchwork::wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=3)

ggsave("publish_new/Fig6Ext.module_spatial.png", pall, width=5.96, height=3.43, 
       units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

## Fig. 6 Ext. Module preservation analysis

```{r}
# Reference: C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622/spatial_coexpression.Rmd#PlotModulePreservationLollipop
```


## ---
## Fig. 7a,d GABA proportion

```{r}
# GABA
CT <- "GABA"
Title <- "Proportion Change<br>(Log2 Fold Change)"
in.prefix <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/anno.L1"

p1 <- permutationPlot.target_ct(CT, Title, in.prefix) + labs(title=CT)

p1@data[, c("FDR", "comparison")]

#            FDR comparison
# 3  0.000999001   PL_vs_AD
# 31 0.001398601   PL_vs_WT
# 32 0.002331002   AD_vs_WT

ggsave("publish_new/fig7a.pdf", p1, width=1.4861, height=1.8333, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("publish_new/fig7a.png", p1, width=1.4861, height=1.8333, dpi=300)

# Glu
CT <- "Glu"
Title <- "Proportion Change<br>(Log2 Fold Change)"
in.prefix <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/anno.L1"

p1 <- permutationPlot.target_ct(CT, Title, in.prefix) + labs(title=CT)

p1@data[, c("FDR", "comparison")]
#            FDR comparison
# 4  0.000999001   PL_vs_AD
# 41 0.001398601   PL_vs_WT
# 42 0.004195804   AD_vs_WT

ggsave("publish_new/fig7.Glu_proportion.pdf", p1, width=1.4861, height=1.8333, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("publish_new/fig7.Glu_proportion.png", p1, width=1.4861, height=1.8333, dpi=300)

# Four GABA subtypes
p.list <- list()
for (CT in c("GABA_0", "GABA_1", "GABA_2", "GABA_3")) {
  # CT <- "GABA_0"
  Title <- "Proportion Change<br>(Log2 Fold Change)"
  in.prefix <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/anno.L2"
  
  p1 <- permutationPlot.target_ct(CT, Title, in.prefix) + labs(title=CT)
  p.list[[CT]] <- p1
}

pall <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=4)

ggsave("publish_new/fig7b.pdf", pall, width=1.4861*4, height=1.8333, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("publish_new/fig7b.png", pall, width=1.4861*4, height=1.8333, dpi=300)

```

## Fig. 7b GABA SN DEGs volcano plot (PL vs AD)

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(ggrepel)
library(EnhancedVolcano)

filt.res <- function(res) {
  res <- na.omit(res)
  res <- res[order(res$padj),]
  res <- subset(res, padj < 0.05 & baseMean > 10)
  return(data.frame(res))
}

# ... (skipping older code versions)

dds <- readRDS("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1/GABA.dds.rds")

for (CP in c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl")) {
  
  P1 <- strsplit(CP, "_vs_")[[1]][1]
  P2 <- strsplit(CP, "_vs_")[[1]][2]
  df <- results(dds, contrast = c("treatment", P1, P2))
  df.sub <- na.omit(df)
  df.sub <- subset(df.sub, baseMean > 10)
  
  df.sub$direction <- ifelse(df.sub$log2FoldChange > 0, yes = "up", no = "down")
  df.sub$color <- df.sub$direction 
  df.sub$color[!(abs(df.sub$log2FoldChange) > 0.4 & df.sub$padj < 0.05)] <- "ns"
  df.sub$gene <- row.names(df.sub)
  
  # Filter criteria:
  # abs(lfc) > 0.4
  # baseMean > 10
  # padj < 0.05
  
  if (CP == "AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl") {
    Title <- "GABA specific DEGs\n(5xFAD-PLX vs 5xFAD-CTRL)"
  }else{
    Title <- "GABA specific DEGs\n(5xFAD-CTRL vs WT-CTRL)"
  }
  
  p <- ggplot(df.sub, aes(log2FoldChange, -log10(padj), color=color)) +
    geom_point(size=1) + 
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.4, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
    geom_vline(xintercept = -0.4, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
    scale_color_manual(name="", values = c("up"="red", "down"="blue", "ns"="grey")) + 
    labs(title = Title) + 
    theme_nature()
  
  p <- p + geom_text_repel(
    # data = subset(df.sub, gene %in% interested_genes),
    # data = subset(df.sub, color != "ns"), # too many genes, too cluttered
    data = subset(df.sub, padj < 0.01), 
    aes(label = gene), 
    color = "black", 
    size = 7 * 0.35278,
    box.padding = 0.5,   
    point.padding = 0.3,  
    min.segment.length = 0.2,  
    max.overlaps = Inf,   
    segment.color = "grey50",  
    segment.size = 0.5,   
    direction = "both",   
    nudge_x = 0.2,       
    nudge_y = 0.2        
  )
  
  out.prefix <- paste0("fig7.SN_pseudobulk_DEGs_vocano.", CP, ".GABA")
  
  ggsave(paste0("publish_new/", out.prefix, ".pdf"), p, width=3.413, height=2.657, device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(paste0("publish_new/", out.prefix, ".png"), p, width=3.413, height=2.657, dpi=300)

}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("publish_new/fig7.SN_pseudobulk_DEGs_vocano.AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl.GABA.png")
knitr::include_graphics("publish_new/fig7.SN_pseudobulk_DEGs_vocano.AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl.GABA.png")
```

## Fig. 7c: GABA PL vs AD gseaplot

```{r}

# code: C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622/104DEGs.Rmd#绘制GABA分化gseaplot
# output: ../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/GABA_development.PL_vs_AD.gseaplot.png

```

## Fig. 7e: cell spatial plot of GABA (Level 1)

```{r}

library(reshape2)

meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")

# Correct coordinates:
# 1. Get the center of each sample.
# 2. Shift to origin.
corrected_coord <- aggregate(cbind(sdimx, sdimy)~list_ID, FUN=median, data=meta.st)
data <- merge(meta.st, corrected_coord, by="list_ID", suffixes=c(".orgin", ".new"))
data$sdimx <- data$sdimx.orgin - data$sdimx.new
data$sdimy <- data$sdimy.orgin - data$sdimy.new
row.names(data) <- data$cell_ID
data <- data[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
st.coord <- data[, c("list_ID", "sdimx", "sdimy")]

df.deconvo <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/cell2location2/anno.L1.spot.anno.prop.csv",
                       row.names=1)
row.names(df.deconvo) <- df.deconvo$cell.id
df.deconvo <- df.deconvo[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
cell_types <- colnames(df.deconvo)[4:ncol(df.deconvo)]

interested_cts <- c("GABA")

data <- cbind(st.coord, GABA=df.deconvo$GABA)

data.sub <- subset(data, list_ID == "5xFAD-CTRL-1")

data.sub <- melt(data.sub, id.vars = c("list_ID", "sdimx", "sdimy"), 
                 measure.vars = interested_cts, 
                 variable.name = "cell_type", value.name = "relative_abundance")

SUMM <- boxplot(data.sub$relative_abundance, plot = F)$stats
upper <- SUMM[5]
middle <- SUMM[3]
lower <- SUMM[1]
data.sub$relative_abundance[data.sub$relative_abundance > upper] <- upper
data.sub$relative_abundance[data.sub$relative_abundance < lower] <- lower
p1 <- ggplot(data.sub, aes(sdimx, sdimy)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=relative_abundance), size=0.55, stroke = 0) + 
  scale_color_gradientn(name="Relative abundance", 
                        colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
                       values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper))) + 
  coord_fixed() + 
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(panel.background=element_blank(), panel.grid=element_blank(),
        axis.title=element_blank(), 
        axis.text=element_blank(), 
        axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.y = element_blank(), 
        plot.title = element_blank(),  
        legend.position = "none")

ggsave("publish_new/Fig7.GABA_spatial.png", p1, width=1.3, height=1.3, dpi = 300)
ggsave("publish_new/Fig7.GABA_spatial.pdf", p1, width=1.3, height=1.3, device = cairo_pdf)

p2 <- p1 + theme(legend.position = "bottom",
                 legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.key.width = unit(8, "mm"), 
        legend.key.height = unit(3, "mm"))

ggsave("publish_new/Fig7.GABA_spatial.legend.pdf", p2, width=4, height=2, device = cairo_pdf)
```

## Fig. 7e: cell spatial plot of GABA subtypes

```{r}

library(reshape2)

meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")

# Correct coordinates:
# 1. Get the center of each sample.
# 2. Shift to origin.
corrected_coord <- aggregate(cbind(sdimx, sdimy)~list_ID, FUN=median, data=meta.st)
data <- merge(meta.st, corrected_coord, by="list_ID", suffixes=c(".orgin", ".new"))
data$sdimx <- data$sdimx.orgin - data$sdimx.new
data$sdimy <- data$sdimy.orgin - data$sdimy.new
row.names(data) <- data$cell_ID
data <- data[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
st.coord <- data[, c("list_ID", "sdimx", "sdimy")]

df.deconvo <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/cell2location2/anno.L2.spot.anno.prop.csv",
                       row.names=1)
row.names(df.deconvo) <- df.deconvo$cell.id
df.deconvo <- df.deconvo[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
cell_types <- colnames(df.deconvo)[4:ncol(df.deconvo)]

interested_cts <- c("GABA_0", "GABA_1", "GABA_2", "GABA_3")

data <- cbind(st.coord, df.deconvo[, interested_cts])

data.sub <- subset(data, list_ID == "5xFAD-CTRL-1")

data.sub <- melt(data.sub, id.vars = c("list_ID", "sdimx", "sdimy"), measure.vars = interested_cts, 
                 variable.name = "cell_type", value.name = "relative_abundance")

SUMM <- boxplot(data.sub$relative_abundance, plot = F)$stats
upper <- SUMM[5]
middle <- SUMM[3]
lower <- SUMM[1]
data.sub$relative_abundance[data.sub$relative_abundance > upper] <- upper
data.sub$relative_abundance[data.sub$relative_abundance < lower] <- lower
p1 <- ggplot(data.sub, aes(sdimx, sdimy)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=relative_abundance), size=0.55, stroke = 0) + 
  scale_color_gradientn(name="Relative abundance", 
                        colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
                       values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper))) + 
  coord_fixed() + facet_wrap(.~cell_type, ncol=4) + 
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(panel.background=element_blank(), panel.grid=element_blank(),
        axis.title=element_blank(), 
        axis.text=element_blank(), 
        axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.y = element_blank(), 
        plot.title = element_blank(), 
        strip.text = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")

ggsave("publish_new/Fig7.GABA_subtype.png",p1, width=1.3*4, height=1.3, dpi = 300)
ggsave("publish_new/Fig7.GABA_subtype.pdf",p1, width=1.3*4, height=1.3, device = cairo_pdf)

p2 <- p1 + theme(legend.position = "bottom",
                 legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.key.width = unit(8, "mm"), 
        legend.key.height = unit(3, "mm"))

ggsave("publish_new/Fig7.GABA_subtype_spatial.legend.pdf", p2, width=1.3*4, height=2, device = cairo_pdf)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("publish_new/Fig7d.png")
```

## Fig. 7f: volcano plot of GABA_0 specific DEGs

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(ggrepel)

dds <- readRDS("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2/GABA_0.dds.rds")

for (CP in c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl")) {
  
  P1 <- strsplit(CP, "_vs_")[[1]][1]
  P2 <- strsplit(CP, "_vs_")[[1]][2]
  df <- results(dds, contrast = c("treatment", P1, P2))
  df.sub <- na.omit(df)
  df.sub <- subset(df.sub, baseMean > 10)
  
  df.sub$direction <- ifelse(df.sub$log2FoldChange > 0, yes = "up", no = "down")
  df.sub$color <- df.sub$direction 
  df.sub$color[!(abs(df.sub$log2FoldChange) > 0.4 & df.sub$padj < 0.05)] <- "ns"
  df.sub$gene <- row.names(df.sub)
  
  interested_genes <- c("Rmst", "Bnc2", "Tfap2b")
  
  # Filter criteria:
  # abs(lfc) > 0.4
  # baseMean > 10
  # padj < 0.05
  
  if (CP == "AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl") {
    Title <- "GABA_0 specific DEGs\n(5xFAD-PLX vs 5xFAD-CTRL)"
  }else{
    Title <- "GABA_0 specific DEGs\n(5xFAD-CTRL vs WT-CTRL)"
  }
  
  p <- ggplot(df.sub, aes(log2FoldChange, -log10(padj), color=color)) +
    geom_point(size=1) + 
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.4, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
    geom_vline(xintercept = -0.4, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
    scale_color_manual(name="", values = c("up"="red", "down"="blue", "ns"="grey")) + 
    labs(title = Title) + 
    theme_nature()
  
  p <- p + geom_text_repel(
    # data = subset(df.sub, gene %in% interested_genes),
    data = subset(df.sub, color!="ns"),
    aes(label = gene), 
    color = "black", 
    size = 7 * 0.35278,
    box.padding = 0.5,   
    point.padding = 0.3,  
    min.segment.length = 0.2,  
    max.overlaps = Inf,   
    segment.color = "grey50",  
    segment.size = 0.5,   
    direction = "both",   
    nudge_x = 0.2,       
    nudge_y = 0.2        
  )
  
  out.prefix <- paste0("fig7.SN_pseudobulk_DEGs_vocano.", CP, ".GABA_0")
  
  ggsave(paste0("publish_new/", out.prefix, ".pdf"), p, width=3.413, height=2.657, device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(paste0("publish_new/", out.prefix, ".png"), p, width=3.413, height=2.657, dpi=300)

}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("publish_new/fig7.SN_pseudobulk_DEGs_vocano.AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl.GABA_0.png")
knitr::include_graphics("publish_new/fig7.SN_pseudobulk_DEGs_vocano.AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl.GABA_0.png")
```

## Fig. 7 Glu SN DEGs volcano plot (PL vs AD)

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(ggrepel)
library(EnhancedVolcano)

filt.res <- function(res) {
  res <- na.omit(res)
  res <- res[order(res$padj),]
  res <- subset(res, padj < 0.05 & baseMean > 10)
  return(data.frame(res))
}

# df <- readRDS("../002SC/001Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/pair_wise_result.L1.rds")
# df.sub <- df$GABA
# df.sub$log2FoldChange <- -df.sub$log2FoldChange
# df.sub <- subset(df.sub, baseMean > 10)
# 
# df.sub$direction <- ifelse(df.sub$log2FoldChange > 0, yes = "up", no = "down")
# df.sub$gene <- row.names(df.sub)

dds <- readRDS("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1/Glu.dds.rds")

# Remove ambient RNA contamination, i.e., genes highly expressed in other cell types, such as Mbp.
cell.DEGs <- read.csv("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/anno.L1.FindAllMarkers.csv", row.names=1)
df.ambient <- subset(cell.DEGs, (!cluster %in% c("Glu", "GABA")) & avg_log2FC > 0.4)

for (CP in c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl")) {
  
  P1 <- strsplit(CP, "_vs_")[[1]][1]
  P2 <- strsplit(CP, "_vs_")[[1]][2]
  df <- results(dds, contrast = c("treatment", P1, P2))
  df.sub <- na.omit(df)
  df.sub <- subset(df.sub, baseMean > 10)
  df.sub <- subset(df.sub, !(row.names(df.sub) %in% df.ambient$gene))
  
  df.sub$direction <- ifelse(df.sub$log2FoldChange > 0, yes = "up", no = "down")
  df.sub$color <- df.sub$direction 
  df.sub$color[!(abs(df.sub$log2FoldChange) > 0.4 & df.sub$padj < 0.05)] <- "ns"
  df.sub$gene <- row.names(df.sub)
  
  # subset(df.sub, color != "ns")
  # write.csv(df.sub, "../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/GABA.PL_vs_AD.csv")
  
  # Display genes meeting specific thresholds.
  
  # interested_genes <- c("Rmst", "Bnc2", "Tfap2b")
  
  # Filter criteria:
  # abs(lfc) > 0.4
  # baseMean > 10
  # padj < 0.05
  
  if (CP == "AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl") {
    Title <- "Glu specific DEGs\n(5xFAD-PLX vs 5xFAD-CTRL)"
  }else{
    Title <- "Glu specific DEGs\n(5xFAD-CTRL vs WT-CTRL)"
  }
  
  p <- ggplot(df.sub, aes(log2FoldChange, -log10(padj), color=color)) +
    geom_point(size=1) + 
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.4, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
    geom_vline(xintercept = -0.4, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
    scale_color_manual(name="", values = c("up"="red", "down"="blue", "ns"="grey")) + 
    labs(title = Title) + 
    theme_nature() + theme(legend.position="none")
  
  p <- p + geom_text_repel(
    # data = subset(df.sub, gene %in% interested_genes),
    # data = subset(df.sub, color != "ns"), # too many genes, too cluttered.
    data = subset(df.sub, padj < 0.01), 
    aes(label = gene), 
    color = "black", 
    size = 7 * 0.35278,
    box.padding = 0.5,   
    point.padding = 0.3,  
    min.segment.length = 0.2,  
    max.overlaps = Inf,   
    segment.color = "grey50",  
    segment.size = 0.5,   
    direction = "both",   
    nudge_x = 0.2,       
    nudge_y = 0.2        
  )
  
  out.prefix <- paste0("fig7.Glu.", CP, ".SN_pseudobulk_DEGs_vocano")
  
  ggsave(paste0("publish_new/", out.prefix, ".pdf"), p, width=2.53, height=2.64, device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(paste0("publish_new/", out.prefix, ".png"), p, width=2.53, height=2.64, dpi=300)

}

# Is there an overlap between Glu DEGs in AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl and PLX specific DEGs?
CP <- "AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl"
P1 <- strsplit(CP, "_vs_")[[1]][1]
P2 <- strsplit(CP, "_vs_")[[1]][2]
df <- results(dds, contrast = c("treatment", P1, P2))
df.sub <- na.omit(df)
df.sub <- subset(df.sub, baseMean > 10)
df.sub <- subset(df.sub, !(row.names(df.sub) %in% df.ambient$gene))

df.sub$direction <- ifelse(df.sub$log2FoldChange > 0, yes = "up", no = "down")
df.sub$color <- df.sub$direction 
df.sub$color[!(abs(df.sub$log2FoldChange) > 0.4 & df.sub$padj < 0.05)] <- "ns"
df.sub$gene <- row.names(df.sub)
gl1 <- subset(df.sub, color != "ns")$gene


PIGs.df <- read.csv("data/PIGs.lfc_0.1.csv", row.names=1)
FADCtrl.PIGs <- intersect(PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="FADCtrl_1", "feats"], 
                          PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="FADCtrl_2", "feats"])
PLX5622.PIGs <- intersect(PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="PLX5622_1", "feats"], 
                          PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="PLX5622_2", "feats"])
WTCtrl.PIGs <- intersect(PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="WTCtrl_1", "feats"], 
                         PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="WTCtrl_2", "feats"])
length(FADCtrl.PIGs) # 13
length(PLX5622.PIGs) # 16
PL.inter.AD <- intersect(FADCtrl.PIGs, PLX5622.PIGs)
FADCtrl.specific <- setdiff(FADCtrl.PIGs, PLX5622.PIGs)
PLX5622.specific <- setdiff(PLX5622.PIGs, FADCtrl.PIGs)

intersect(PLX5622.specific, gl1)

out <- paste0("PL vs AD, Glu specific DEGs include: ", paste(gl1, collapse=", "), ";\n", 
              "PLX specific PAGs include: ", paste(PLX5622.specific, collapse=", "), 
              ";\nThere is no overlap between the two gene lists.")
```

## Fig. 7 High C6 expression in Glu_5

```{r}

# sobj <- readRDS("")
sobj.sub <- subset(sobj, anno.L1 == "Glu")

sobj.sub$anno.L2 <- factor(sobj.sub$anno.L2, levels=paste0("Glu_", 0:12), ordered=T)

Idents(sobj.sub) <- "anno.L2"

p <- VlnPlot(sobj.sub, features = "C6", pt.size = 1, combine = F)[[1]]

saveRDS(p$data, "002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/Glu/C6.p.rds")

p.data <- readRDS("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/Glu/C6.p.rds")

p <- ggplot(p.data, aes(ident, C6)) + geom_violin() + geom_jitter(size=.8, alpha=.6)

p <- p + labs(y="Expression Level of <i>C6</i>") + 
  theme_nature() + theme(legend.position = "none", 
                         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, vjust=0.7), 
                         axis.title.y = element_markdown(), axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
                         plot.title=element_blank())

ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/Glu/C6.png", p, width=3.413, height=2.657, dpi=300)

```


## Fig. 7g: marker genes dotplot across GABA_0 subtypes

```{r}
library(Seurat)

sobj.GABA_0 <- readRDS("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/cluster.L3/sobj.GABA_0.rds")

sobj.GABA_0$anno.L3 <- paste0(sobj.GABA_0$anno.L2, "_", sobj.GABA_0$nn_res.0.3)

Idents(sobj.GABA_0) <- "anno.L3"

p <- DotPlot(sobj.GABA_0, features=c("Bnc2", "Lepr", "Agrp", "Npy", "Pomc", "Tfap2b")) + 
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
        legend.title = element_blank(), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(face="italic", angle=45, vjust=.7))

# Manually add legend title: Average Expression, Percent Expressed

ggsave("publish_new/fig7f.png", p, width=2.6347, height=2.2222, dpi=300)
ggsave("publish_new/fig7f.pdf", p, width=2.6347, height=2.2222, device=cairo_pdf)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("publish_new/fig7f.png")
```

## Fig. 7h: proportion test of Bnc2+ GABAergic neuron. 

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

pairs <- list()
pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
pairs[[3]] <- c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl")


outdir <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest_subtype"
  
CT <- "GABA_0"

p.list <- list()
n <- 1
for (pair in pairs) {
  S1 <- pair[1]
  S2 <- pair[2]
  infile <- paste0(outdir, "/", CT, ".", S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
 
  data <- read.csv(infile)
  data <- data[order(data$obs_log2FD, decreasing = T), ]
  data$clusters <- factor(data$clusters, levels=data$clusters, ordered=T)

  data$point.color <- ifelse(abs(data$obs_log2FD) > log2(1.2) & data$FDR<0.05,
                             "abs(obs_log2FD)>log2(1.2) & FDR<0.05", "NA")
  
  # mapping <- c("AD_5622"="5xFAD-PLX", "AD_ctrl" = "5xFAD-CTRL", "WT_ctrl" = "WT-CTRL")
  
  label.color <- rep("black", length(data$clusters))
  names(label.color) <- data$clusters
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(clusters, obs_log2FD)) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin=boot_CI_2.5, ymax=boot_CI_97.5)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log2(1.2), linetype="dashed", color="grey") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=log2(1.2), linetype="dashed", color="grey") +
    geom_point(aes(color=point.color), size=1) +
    ggtitle(paste0(mapping[S1], "_vs_", mapping[S2])) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("abs(obs_log2FD)>log2(1.2) & FDR<0.05"="red", "NA"="black")) +
    theme_nature() + 
    theme(legend.position = "none", 
          axis.title=element_blank(), 
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = label.color, size=9), 
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = label.color, size=7), 
          plot.title = element_text(size=8))
  p.list[[n]] <- p
  n <- n + 1
}

p <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=3)

ggsave("publish_new/fig7g.png", p, width=5.2769, height=3.3 , dpi=300)
ggsave("publish_new/fig7g.pdf", p, width=5.2769, height=3.3  , device=cairo_pdf)

```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("publish_new/fig7g.png")
```

## Fig. 7e: cell spatial plot of Glu_5 (Level 2)

```{r}

library(reshape2)

meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")

# Correct coordinates:
# 1. Get the center of each sample.
# 2. Shift to origin.
corrected_coord <- aggregate(cbind(sdimx, sdimy)~list_ID, FUN=median, data=meta.st)
data <- merge(meta.st, corrected_coord, by="list_ID", suffixes=c(".orgin", ".new"))
data$sdimx <- data$sdimx.orgin - data$sdimx.new
data$sdimy <- data$sdimy.orgin - data$sdimy.new
row.names(data) <- data$cell_ID
data <- data[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
st.coord <- data[, c("list_ID", "sdimx", "sdimy")]

df.deconvo <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/cell2location2/anno.L2.spot.anno.prop.csv",
                       row.names=1)
row.names(df.deconvo) <- df.deconvo$cell.id
df.deconvo <- df.deconvo[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
cell_types <- colnames(df.deconvo)[4:ncol(df.deconvo)]

interested_cts <- c("Glu_5")

data <- cbind(st.coord, Glu_5=df.deconvo$Glu_5)

data.sub <- subset(data, list_ID == "5xFAD-CTRL-1")

data.sub <- melt(data.sub, id.vars = c("list_ID", "sdimx", "sdimy"), 
                 measure.vars = interested_cts, 
                 variable.name = "cell_type", value.name = "relative_abundance")

SUMM <- boxplot(data.sub$relative_abundance, plot = F)$stats
upper <- SUMM[5]
middle <- SUMM[3]
lower <- SUMM[1]
data.sub$relative_abundance[data.sub$relative_abundance > upper] <- upper
data.sub$relative_abundance[data.sub$relative_abundance < lower] <- lower
p1 <- ggplot(data.sub, aes(sdimx, sdimy)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=relative_abundance), size=0.55, stroke = 0) + 
  scale_color_gradientn(name="Relative abundance", 
                        colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
                       values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper))) + 
  coord_fixed() + 
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(panel.background=element_blank(), panel.grid=element_blank(),
        axis.title=element_blank(), 
        axis.text=element_blank(), 
        axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.y = element_blank(), 
        plot.title = element_blank(),  
        legend.position = "none")

ggsave("publish_new/Fig7.Glu_5_spatial.png", p1, width=1.3, height=1.3, dpi = 300)
ggsave("publish_new/Fig7.Glu_5_spatial.pdf", p1, width=1.3, height=1.3, device = cairo_pdf)

p2 <- p1 + theme(legend.position = "bottom",
                 legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.key.width = unit(8, "mm"), 
        legend.key.height = unit(3, "mm"))

ggsave("publish_new/Fig7.Glu_5_spatial.legend.pdf", p2, width=4, height=2, device = cairo_pdf)
```

## ---


## Fig. 8a: reactive astrocytes markers

```{r}

# Get gene expression matrix
# env: dhlab
# dir: prj root
if (F) {
  gobj <- readRDS("001ST/001Giotto_out/testcombo.rds")
  gobj.meta <- Giotto::pDataDT(gobj)
  
  interested_genes <- c("Gfap", "Apoe", "Aqp4", "S100b")
  df.expr <- gobj@expression$cell$rna$normalized[interested_genes, ] 
  df.expr <- data.frame(t(as.matrix(df.expr@exprMat)))
  gobj.meta <- cbind(gobj.meta, df.expr)
  
  write.csv(gobj.meta, "001ST/001Giotto_out/009gene_expression/Gfap_Apoe_Aqp4_S100b.csv")
}

# env: thinkpad
# dir: manuscript
interested_genes <- c("Gfap", "Apoe", "Aqp4", "S100b")
gobj.meta <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/009gene_expression/Gfap_Apoe_Aqp4_S100b.csv", row.names=1)
# gobj.meta.sub <- subset(gobj.meta, ! cell_types %in% c("Lateral Ventricle", "Third Ventricle", "C12"))
gobj.meta.sub <- subset(gobj.meta, cell_types == "Olfactory area")


rename_group <- c("WTCtrl" = "WT-CTRL",
                  "FADCtrl" = "5xFAD-CTRL",
                  "PLX5622" = "5xFAD-PLX")

gobj.meta.sub$treatment <- rename_group[gobj.meta.sub$treatment]

gobj.meta.sub$treatment <- factor(gobj.meta.sub$treatment, levels=c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX"), 
                                      ordered=T)

if (T) {
  # spot DEGs tests used wilcoxon, and figures display spot Level instead of aggregated.
  p.list <- list()
  for (gene in interested_genes) {
    max.val <- max(gobj.meta.sub[[gene]])
    p1 <- ggplot(gobj.meta.sub, aes(treatment, .data[[gene]])) + 
      geom_violin(aes(fill=treatment, color=treatment)) + 
      geom_boxplot(aes(fill=treatment, color=treatment), width=0.3) + 
      scale_fill_manual(values = group.fill) + 
      scale_color_manual(values = group.stroke) + 
      coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0, max.val*1.3)) + 
      stat_compare_means(
        comparisons = list(c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-CTRL"), c("5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX")),
        method = "wilcox.test",
        tip.length = signif_tip_length,
        label = "p.format",
        family = "Arial",
        size = signif_textsize,
        bracket.size = axis_linewidth,
        vjust = -0.2
      ) + 
      theme_nature() + 
      theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(), 
            axis.text.x=element_blank(), 
            legend.position="none")
    p.list[[gene]] <- p1
  }
  
  p <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=2)
  
  ggsave("publish_new/fig8a.png", p, width=2.9683, height=3.3432, dpi=300)
  ggsave("publish_new/fig8a.pdf", p, width=2.9683, height=3.3432, device=cairo_pdf)
}



if (F) {
  # y axis title 占用空间过多
  p.list <- list()

  for (Gene in interested_genes) {
    # Gene <- "Gfap"
  
    df.expr <- gobj.meta.sub[, c("treatment", "cell_types", "batch", Gene)]
    colnames(df.expr) <- c("treatment", "cell_types", "batch", "gene")
    
    gobj.meta.agg <- aggregate(gene~treatment+cell_types+batch, FUN=mean, data=df.expr)
    
    
    rename_group <- c("WTCtrl" = "WT-CTRL",
                      "FADCtrl" = "5xFAD-CTRL",
                      "PLX5622" = "5xFAD-PLX")
    gobj.meta.agg$treatment <- rename_group[gobj.meta.agg$treatment]
    
    gobj.meta.agg$treatment <- factor(gobj.meta.agg$treatment, levels=c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX"), 
                                          ordered=T)
    
    p <- ggplot(gobj.meta.agg, aes(treatment, gene, color = treatment, fill = treatment)) +
      geom_custom_barplot() + 
      # stat_compare_means(
      #   comparisons = list(c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-CTRL"), c("5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX")),
      #   method = "t.test", 
      #   tip.length = signif_tip_length,
      #   label = "p.format",
      #   family = "Arial", 
      #   size = signif_textsize, 
      #   bracket.size = axis_linewidth, 
      #   vjust = -0.2
      # ) +
      labs(x = "", y = paste0("<b><i>", Gene, "</i> expression<br>(Log-normalized counts)</b>")) + 
      coord_cartesian(ylim = c(NA, max(gobj.meta.agg$gene) * 1.3)) 
    
    p.list[[Gene]] <- p
  }
  
  p <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=2)
  ggsave("publish_new/fig8a.png", p, width=2.9683, height=3.3432, dpi=300)
  ggsave("publish_new/fig8a.pdf", p, width=2.9683, height=3.3432, device=cairo_pdf)
}



```

## Fig. 8c Gfap+Apoe immunofluorescence quantification

```{r}

library(readxl)
data <- read_excel("source_data/Figure 8/Figure 8h.xls")

data.long <- melt(data, id.vars = "gene", variable.name = "treatment")
data.long$treatment <- sub("\\.\\.\\.\\d+$", "", data.long$treatment, perl=T)
data.long$treatment <- factor(data.long$treatment, 
                         levels=names(group.fill), 
                         ordered=T)

upper.limit <- max(data.long$value)*1.3

p <- ggplot(data.long, aes(treatment, value, fill=treatment, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_custom_barplot() + 
   stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX")),
    method = "t.test",
    tip.length = signif_tip_length,
    label = "p.signif",
    family = "Arial", 
    size = signif_textsize, 
    bracket.size = signif_linewidth
  ) + 
  facet_wrap(.~gene) + 
  labs(y="Relative positive area") + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_comma()) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(NA, upper.limit))

ggsave.plus("fig8c", p, 1.6315, 1.6212)
# ggsave("publish/fig1d.pdf", p, width=2.865, height=2.168, device=cairo_pdf)
# ggsave("publish/fig1d.png", p, width=2.865, height=2.168, dpi=300)

```


## Fig. 8e Gfap WB quantification

```{r}

library(readxl)
data <- read_excel("source_data/Figure 8/Figure 8f.xls")

data.long <- melt(data, variable.name = "treatment")
data.long$treatment <- sub("X", "x", data.long$treatment)

data.long$treatment <- factor(data.long$treatment, 
                         levels=names(group.fill), 
                         ordered=T)

upper.limit <- max(data.long$value)*1.3

tukey <- data.long %>% 
#      group_by(Brain_region) %>%
  tukey_hsd(value ~ treatment)

tukey$comparison <- paste0(tukey$group1, "_vs_", tukey$group2)
tukey$comparison <- factor(tukey$comparison, levels=c("WT-CTRL_vs_5xFAD-CTRL",
                                                      "5xFAD-CTRL_vs_5xFAD-PLX",
                                                      "WT-CTRL_vs_5xFAD-PLX"), ordered=T)
tukey  <- tukey[order(tukey$comparison), ]

tukey <- tukey %>% add_xy_position(x = "treatment", step.increase = 0.14)

tukey <- subset(tukey, comparison != "WT-CTRL_vs_5xFAD-PLX")

p <- ggplot(data.long, aes(treatment, value, fill=treatment, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_custom_barplot() + 
  stat_pvalue_manual(tukey, label = "p.adj.signif", tip.length = 0,
                       family="Arial", size=signif_textsize,
                       bracket.size = signif_linewidth) + 
  labs(y="Relative GFAP level") + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_comma()) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(NA, upper.limit))

ggsave.plus("fig8e", p, 1.3264, 1.3264)
# ggsave("publish/fig1d.pdf", p, width=2.865, height=2.168, device=cairo_pdf)
# ggsave("publish/fig1d.png", p, width=2.865, height=2.168, dpi=300)

```

## Fig. 8f Aβ~C1qa~Gfap

Original Fig. 8b. Swap x and y axes.

```{r}
# Fig. 8b------------------
# Astrocyte activation is highly correlated with microglia.
# AD vs WT Gfap increase ratio ~ AD vs WT C1qa increase ratio

gobj.meta <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/microglia_distribution/gobj.meta.not_log_normalized_expr.csv", row.names=1)

# 1. Complete grouping summary and AD/WT contrast calculation in one step
gobj.meta.agg.AD_vs_WT <- gobj.meta %>%
  # Calculate mean by treatment, batch, cell_types
  group_by(treatment, batch, cell_types) %>%
  summarise(
    C1qa = mean(C1qa, na.rm = TRUE),
    Gfap = mean(Gfap, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Abeta_index = mean(Abeta_index, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  # Pivot AD and WT to wide format
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = treatment,
    values_from = c(C1qa, Gfap, Abeta_index),
    names_sep = "."
  ) %>%
  # Calculate derived indicators
  mutate(
    C1qa.FC.AD = C1qa.FADCtrl/ C1qa.WTCtrl,
    Gfap.FC.AD = Gfap.FADCtrl/ Gfap.WTCtrl,
    C1qa.FC.PL = C1qa.PLX5622 / C1qa.FADCtrl,
    Gfap.FC.PL = Gfap.PLX5622 / Gfap.FADCtrl,
    Abeta_index.AD = Abeta_index.FADCtrl - Abeta_index.WTCtrl, 
    Abeta_index.FC.PL = Abeta_index.PLX5622 / Abeta_index.FADCtrl
  ) %>%
  # Filter specific cell types
  filter(!cell_types %in% c("C12", "Lateral Ventricle", "Third Ventricle"))

# 2. Complete mean and standard error calculation in one step
gobj.meta.agg.AD_vs_WT.agg <- gobj.meta.agg.AD_vs_WT %>%
  group_by(cell_types) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      c(C1qa.FC.AD, Gfap.FC.AD, C1qa.FC.PL, Gfap.FC.PL, Abeta_index.AD, Abeta_index.FC.PL),
      list(
        mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        sem = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())
      )
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# write.csv(gobj.meta.agg.AD_vs_WT.agg, "001Giotto_out/Abeta_and_depletion_rate/gobj.meta.agg.csv")

# PL vs AD Gfap increase ratio ~ corrected_Abeta_index
# gobj.meta.agg <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/Abeta_and_depletion_rate/gobj.meta.agg.csv", row.names=1)

mycolorcode = c("Isocortex"="#666666",
                "Fiber tracts"="#E7298A",
                "Thalamus"="#FF7F00",
                "Olfactory area"="#E41A1C",
                "Hypothalamus"="#377EB8",
                "Hippocampus"="#4DAF4A",
                "Cortical subplate"="#A65628",
                "Meninges"="#80B1D3",
                "Striatum"="#B3DE69")

# Do not use facet to show the relationship between Gfap ~ Aβ and Gfap ~ C1qa. 
# Use patchwork instead. Because although the horizontal axis is Gfap FC for both, 
# the vertical axis is C1qa FC for one and Aβ increment for the other, which are two different indicators.

p1 <- ggplot(gobj.meta.agg.AD_vs_WT.agg, aes(Abeta_index.AD_mean, Gfap.FC.AD_mean)) + 
  geom_smooth(method="lm", linewidth=geom_linewidth) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=cell_types), shape=21, size = 2, fill=NA, stroke = geom_linewidth) + # Optional: Add points at mean positions
  stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x.npc = "left", label.y.npc = "top", size=signif_textsize, ) + 
  scale_color_manual(name="Brain Region", values = mycolorcode) + 
  labs(y="Fold Change of <i>Gfap</i><br>in 5xFAD-CTRL vs WT-CTRL", 
       x="Mean Aβ Index") +  
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(axis.title.y = element_markdown(), legend.position = "none")

p2 <- ggplot(gobj.meta.agg.AD_vs_WT.agg, aes(C1qa.FC.AD_mean, Gfap.FC.AD_mean)) + 
  geom_smooth(method="lm", linewidth=geom_linewidth) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=cell_types), shape=21, size = 2, fill=NA, stroke = geom_linewidth) + # Optional: Add points at mean positions
  stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x.npc = "left", label.y.npc = "top", size=signif_textsize) + 
  scale_color_manual(name="Brain Region", values = mycolorcode) + 
  labs(y="Fold Change of <i>Gfap</i><br>in 5xFAD-CTRL vs WT-CTRL", 
       x="Fold Change of <i>C1qa</i><br>in 5xFAD-CTRL vs WT-CTRL") +  
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(axis.title.x = element_markdown(), 
        axis.title.y = element_markdown(), legend.position = "none") # legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal"

pall <- p1 / p2

ggsave("publish_new/fig8b.pdf", pall, width=3.162, height=4.175, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("publish_new/fig8b.png", pall, width=3.162, height=4.175, dpi=300)
```

## Fig. 8g Astro ST DEGs

Previously generated directly with shinyapp. Needs update.

```{r}
# C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622/003ST_DEGs_spot.Rmd#st-degs-heatmap-pdf
```


## Fig. 8h Astrocytes subtype markers

```{r}
library(Seurat)

sobj.sub <- readRDS("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/cluster.L3/sobj.Astro.rds")
Idents(sobj.sub) <- "nn_res.0.3"

sobj.sub <- subset(sobj.sub, idents=c(0, 1))

p <- DotPlot(sobj.sub, c("Slc1a2", "Dclk1", "Mfge8", "Erbb4", "Slc6a11", "Agt")) + 
  coord_flip() + 
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(face="italic"), axis.title.y=element_blank())
ggsave("publish_new/fig8h.pdf", p, width=2.4077, height = 1.9992, device = cairo_pdf)
```


## Fig. 8i Astro subtype spatial distribution

Reference: Fig. 7e

```{r}

library(reshape2)

meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")

# Correct coordinates:
# 1. Get the center of each sample.
# 2. Shift to origin.
corrected_coord <- aggregate(cbind(sdimx, sdimy)~list_ID, FUN=median, data=meta.st)
data <- merge(meta.st, corrected_coord, by="list_ID", suffixes=c(".orgin", ".new"))
data$sdimx <- data$sdimx.orgin - data$sdimx.new
data$sdimy <- data$sdimy.orgin - data$sdimy.new
row.names(data) <- data$cell_ID
data <- data[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
st.coord <- data[, c("list_ID", "sdimx", "sdimy")]

df.deconvo <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/cell2location2/anno.L3.spot.anno.prop.csv",
                       row.names=1)
row.names(df.deconvo) <- df.deconvo$cell.id
df.deconvo <- df.deconvo[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
cell_types <- colnames(df.deconvo)[4:ncol(df.deconvo)]

interested_cts <- c("Astro_0", "Astro_1")

data <- cbind(st.coord, df.deconvo[, interested_cts])

data.sub <- subset(data, list_ID == "5xFAD-CTRL-1")

data.sub <- melt(data.sub, id.vars = c("list_ID", "sdimx", "sdimy"), measure.vars = interested_cts, 
                 variable.name = "cell_type", value.name = "relative_abundance")

SUMM <- boxplot(data.sub$relative_abundance, plot = F)$stats
upper <- SUMM[5]
middle <- SUMM[3]
lower <- SUMM[1]
data.sub$relative_abundance[data.sub$relative_abundance > upper] <- upper
data.sub$relative_abundance[data.sub$relative_abundance < lower] <- lower
p <- ggplot(data.sub, aes(sdimx, sdimy)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=relative_abundance), size=0.55, stroke = 0) + 
  scale_color_gradientn(name="Relative abundance", 
                        colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
                       values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper))) + 
  labs(title=ct) + 
  coord_fixed() + facet_wrap(.~cell_type, ncol=1) + 
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(panel.background=element_blank(), 
        panel.grid=element_blank(),
        axis.title=element_blank(), 
        axis.text=element_blank(), 
        axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.y = element_blank(), 
        plot.title = element_blank(), 
        legend.title=element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_blank())

ggsave("publish_new/Fig8i.png", width=2, height=2.3776, dpi = 300)
ggsave("publish_new/Fig8i.pdf", width=2, height=2.3776, device = cairo_pdf)
```


## Fig. 8j Astro marker differences between groups

```{r}

library(Seurat)
sobj <- readRDS("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/cluster.L3/sobj.Astro.rds")
Idents(sobj) <- "nn_res.0.3"

sobj.sub <- subset(sobj, idents=c(0, 1))

mapping <- c(WT_ctrl="WT-CTRL", AD_ctrl="5xFAD-CTRL", AD_5622="5xFAD-PLX")
sobj.sub@meta.data$treatment <- mapping[sobj.sub$treatment]
sobj.sub@meta.data$treatment <- factor(sobj.sub@meta.data$treatment, levels=names(group.fill), ordered=T)

genes_of_interest <- c("Slc1a2", "Gramd3", "Nrg3", "Prdm16")  

# expr_df <- FetchData(object = sobj.sub, 
#                      vars = genes_of_interest, 
#                      layer = "data")           # Or "counts" / "scale.data"
# 
# # Or add a column for each gene (common practice)
# sobj.sub <- AddMetaData(sobj.sub, metadata = expr_df)

p1 <- VlnPlot(sobj.sub, features = c("Slc1a2"), idents = 0, group.by = "treatment", cols=group.fill) +
  labs(y="Expression Level\nin Astro_0") + 
  theme_nature() + 
  theme(axis.text.x=element_blank(), legend.position="none", axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        plot.title=element_text(face="italic"))
p2 <- VlnPlot(sobj.sub, features = c("Gramd3"), idents = 0, group.by = "treatment", cols=group.fill) + 
    theme_nature() + 
   theme(axis.text.x=element_blank(), legend.position="none", axis.title=element_blank(),
        plot.title=element_text(face="italic"))
p3 <- VlnPlot(sobj.sub, features = c("Nrg3"), idents = 1, group.by = "treatment", cols=group.fill) + 
   labs(y="Expression Level\nin Astro_1") + 
    theme_nature() + 
   theme(axis.text.x=element_blank(), legend.position="none", axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        plot.title=element_text(face="italic"))
p4 <- VlnPlot(sobj.sub, features = c("Prdm16"), idents = 1, group.by = "treatment", cols=group.fill) + 
    theme_nature() + 
   theme(axis.text.x=element_blank(), legend.position="none", axis.title=element_blank(),
        plot.title=element_text(face="italic"))

p <- (p1 | p2) / (p3 | p4)

ggsave("publish_new/fig8j.pdf", p, width=2, height=2.375, device=cairo_pdf)
```

## Fig. 5g: Aβ index ~ Gfap

```{r}
# fig. 5e ----

# Aβ index ~ Trem2/Tmem119
gobj.meta <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/microglia_distribution/gobj.meta.log_normalized_expr.csv", row.names=1)
meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")
meta.st$Gfap <- gobj.meta$Gfap
meta.st$Abeta_index <- gobj.meta$Abeta_index

meta.st.sub <- subset(meta.st, 
                      treatment != "WT-CTRL", 
                      select=c("treatment", "Abeta_index", "Gfap"))

meta.st.sub.long <- melt(meta.st.sub, 
                         id.vars = c("treatment", "Abeta_index"), 
                         measure.vars = c("Gfap"), 
                         variable.name = "gene", value.name = "expression")


Gene <- "Gfap"
data <- subset(meta.st.sub.long, gene == Gene)
y_axis.title <- paste0("<b><i>", Gene, "</i> expression<br>(Log-normalized counts)</b>")
p <- ggplot(data, aes(Abeta_index, expression, group=treatment, color=treatment)) + 
geom_point(shape=21, fill=NA, size=1) + 
labs(x="Aβ index", 
     y=y_axis.title) + 
geom_smooth(method="lm") + 
stat_cor() + 
scale_color_manual(values = group.stroke) + 
theme_nature() + 
theme(axis.title.y = element_markdown(), 
      legend.position = "bottom", 
      legend.title=element_blank(), 
      legend.direction = "horizontal")
  

ggsave("publish_new/Fig5e.pdf", p, width=2.5, height=4.6179, device=cairo_pdf) # Enlarged.
ggsave("publish_new/Fig5e.png", p, width=2.5, height=4.6179, dpi=300)

```

Sent directly to me by the supervisor.
