```{r}
# Drawn using draw.io. Saved on Google Drive

```


## Fig. S1 c Single-cell annotation

Code: C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622/102cell_type_anno.Rmd#cellstar-expr-dotplot-final-jpg

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/cellstar.expr.dotplot.final.jpg")
```

##---
## Fig. S2 a-b ST UMAP and spatial plot

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")

mycolorcode = c("Isocortex"="#666666",
                "Fiber tracts"="#E7298A",
                "Thalamus"="#FF7F00",
                "Olfactory area"="#E41A1C",
                "Hypothalamus"="#377EB8",
                "Hippocampus"="#4DAF4A",
                "Cortical subplate"="#A65628",
                "Meninges"="#80B1D3",
                "Striatum"="#B3DE69",
                "Lateral Ventricle"="#D9D9D9",
                "Third Ventricle"="#BC80BD",
                "C12"="#FFED6F")

meta.st$list_ID <- factor(meta.st$list_ID, levels=c("WT-CTRL-1", "5xFAD-CTRL-1", "5xFAD-PLX-1", 
                                                    "WT-CTRL-2", "5xFAD-CTRL-2", "5xFAD-PLX-2"), 
                          ordered=T)

p1 <- ggplot(meta.st, aes(UMAP_1, UMAP_2)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=brain_regions), stroke=0, size=0.8) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = mycolorcode) + 
  facet_wrap(.~list_ID, ncol=3) + 
  theme_nature() + theme(axis.text=element_blank())

p2 <- ggplot(meta.st, aes(sdimx, sdimy)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=brain_regions), stroke=0, size=0.8) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = mycolorcode) + 
  facet_wrap(.~list_ID, ncol=3, scale="free") + 
  theme_nature() + theme(axis.text=element_blank())

p <- p1 / p2

p.tag <- "ST_UMAP_and_spatial"
ggsave(paste0("publish_new/", p.tag, ".png"), p, width=6.81, height=8.04, dpi=300)
ggsave(paste0("publish_new/", p.tag, ".pdf"), p, width=6.81, height=8.04, device=cairo_pdf)
```

## Fig. S2 c Brain region marker Dotplot

参考：C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622/001filter_and_integrate.Rmd#brain-region-top3-markers-scaled-dotplot-png

##---
## Fig. S3 a-c anno.L2 deconvo plot

Read metadata and perform centering

```{r}
library(ggforce)
library(reshape2)

meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")

#   Correct coordinates:
#   1. Get the center of each sample.
#   2. Shift to 0.
corrected_coord <- aggregate(cbind(sdimx, sdimy)~list_ID, FUN=median, data=meta.st)
data <- merge(meta.st, corrected_coord, by="list_ID", suffixes=c(".orgin", ".new"))
data$sdimx <- data$sdimx.orgin - data$sdimx.new
data$sdimy <- data$sdimy.orgin - data$sdimy.new
row.names(data) <- data$cell_ID
data <- data[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
st.coord <- data[, c("list_ID", "sdimx", "sdimy")]

```

anno.L2

```{r}

df.deconvo <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/cell2location2/anno.L2.spot.anno.prop.csv",
                       row.names=1)
row.names(df.deconvo) <- df.deconvo$cell.id
df.deconvo <- df.deconvo[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
cell_types <- colnames(df.deconvo)[4:ncol(df.deconvo)]

# Plotting
# Image optimization:
# 1. Restore spots to real scale: 55. ok
# 2. Restore brain slices to real scale: coord_fix(). To use this parameter, coordinates must be corrected first. 
#   Get the center coordinates of each sample, then set the center as origin. AI can generate a function. ok

# 3. Color: blue-white-red. Median is white. ok
# 6. Plot multiple cell subtypes. Merge using patchwork.
# 4. Other styles consistent with the paper.
# 5. Label brain regions

if (F) {
  # Set color scale separately for each sample.
  p.list <- list()
  
  # Fixed spot size, requires geom_circle, which is slow.
  for (ct in interested_cts) {
    data.ct <- data.sub[, c("sdimx", "sdimy", ct)]
    colnames(data.ct) <- c("sdimx", "sdimy", "abundance")
    # if (ct == "Micro_0") ct <- "HOM"
    # if (ct == "Micro_1") ct <- "DAM"
    data.ct.summary <- boxplot(data.ct$abundance, plot = F)$stats
    upper <- data.ct.summary[5]
    middle <- data.ct.summary[3]
    lower <- data.ct.summary[1]
    data.ct$abundance[data.ct$abundance > upper] <- upper
    data.ct$abundance[data.ct$abundance < lower] <- lower
    p <- ggplot(data.ct, aes(sdimx, sdimy)) + 
      # geom_point(aes(color=abundance), size=.05) + 
      geom_circle(aes(x0 = sdimx, y0 = sdimy, r=55, fill=abundance), color = NA) +
      scale_fill_gradientn(colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
                           values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper))) + 
      labs(title=ct) + 
      coord_fixed() + 
      theme_nature() + 
      theme(panel.background=element_blank(), panel.grid=element_blank(),
            axis.title=element_blank(), 
            axis.text=element_blank(), 
            axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
            legend.position = "none", 
            axis.line.x = element_blank(), 
            axis.line.y = element_blank(), 
            plot.title = element_blank())
    
    p.list[[ct]] <- p
  }
  
pall <- patchwork::wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=2)
  
ggsave("publish_new/Fig4d.png", width=3.5, height=3.5 * 785/632, dpi = 300)
} else {
  # If we want to compare between treatments, set a unified color scale for all 6 samples.
  p.list <- list()
  
  for (CT in cell_types) {
    if (F) {
      # for test
      CT <- "Micro"
    }
    data.ct <- cbind(st.coord, abundance=df.deconvo[[CT]])
    
    # order
    data.ct$list_ID <- factor(data.ct$list_ID, levels = c("WT-CTRL-1", "WT-CTRL-2",
                                                          "5xFAD-CTRL-1", "5xFAD-CTRL-2",
                                                          "5xFAD-PLX-1", "5xFAD-PLX-2"),
                              ordered=T)
    if (F) {
      data.ct <- subset(data.ct, list_ID == "5xFAD-CTRL-1")
    }
    
    data.ct.summary <- boxplot(data.ct$abundance, plot = F)$stats
    upper <- data.ct.summary[5]
    middle <- data.ct.summary[3]
    lower <- data.ct.summary[1]
    data.ct$abundance[data.ct$abundance > upper] <- upper
    data.ct$abundance[data.ct$abundance < lower] <- lower
    
    p <- ggplot(data.ct, aes(sdimx, sdimy))
    
    real_spot_size <- F
    
    if (real_spot_size) {
      p <- p + geom_circle(aes(x0 = sdimx, y0 = sdimy, r=55, fill=abundance), color = NA) +
            scale_fill_gradientn(name = "Relative\nAbundance",
                                 colours=c("blue", "white", "red"),
                                 values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper)))
    } else {
      p <- p + geom_point(aes(color=abundance), size=.05) + 
          scale_color_gradientn(name = "Relative\nAbundance",
                                colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
                                values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper)))
    }
    p <- p + labs(title=ct, y=CT) + 
      facet_wrap(.~list_ID, ncol=6) + 
      coord_fixed() + 
      theme_nature() + 
      theme(panel.background=element_blank(), 
            panel.grid=element_blank(),
            axis.title.x=element_blank(), 
            axis.text=element_blank(), 
            axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
            axis.line.x = element_blank(), 
            axis.line.y = element_blank(), 
            plot.title = element_blank(), 
            legend.title = element_text(size=9, face = "plain"),
            strip.text = element_text(size=9, face = "plain"))
    
    p.list[[CT]] <- p
  }
  # anno.L2: 8, 8, 6, total 3 pages.
  page1 <- c(paste0("GABA_", 0:3), paste0("Glu_", 0:3))
  page2 <- paste0("Glu_", 4:11)
  page3 <- c("Glu_12", "Astro", "Endo.Others", "Micro", "OPC", "Oligo")
  p.page1 <- patchwork::wrap_plots(p.list[page1], ncol=1)
  p.page2 <- patchwork::wrap_plots(p.list[page2], ncol=1)
  p.page3 <- patchwork::wrap_plots(p.list[page3], ncol=1)
  ggsave("publish_new/FigS2.1.png", p.page1, width=8.27, height=11.69, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("publish_new/FigS2.2.png", p.page2, width=8.27, height=11.69, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("publish_new/FigS2.3.png", p.page3, width=8.27, height=11.69, dpi = 300)
}
```

## Fig. S3 d-g anno.L3 deconvolution

```{r}

df.deconvo <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/cell2location2/anno.L3.spot.anno.prop.csv",
                       row.names=1)
row.names(df.deconvo) <- df.deconvo$cell.id
df.deconvo <- df.deconvo[meta.st$cell_ID, ]
cell_types <- colnames(df.deconvo)[4:ncol(df.deconvo)]

p.list <- list()

for (CT in cell_types) {
  if (F) {
    # for test
    CT <- "Micro"
  }
  data.ct <- cbind(st.coord, abundance=df.deconvo[[CT]])
  
  # order
  data.ct$list_ID <- factor(data.ct$list_ID, levels = c("WT-CTRL-1", "WT-CTRL-2",
                                                        "5xFAD-CTRL-1", "5xFAD-CTRL-2",
                                                        "5xFAD-PLX-1", "5xFAD-PLX-2"),
                            ordered=T)
  if (F) {
    data.ct <- subset(data.ct, list_ID == "5xFAD-CTRL-1")
  }
  
  data.ct.summary <- boxplot(data.ct$abundance, plot = F)$stats
  upper <- data.ct.summary[5]
  middle <- data.ct.summary[3]
  lower <- data.ct.summary[1]
  data.ct$abundance[data.ct$abundance > upper] <- upper
  data.ct$abundance[data.ct$abundance < lower] <- lower
  
  p <- ggplot(data.ct, aes(sdimx, sdimy))
  
  real_spot_size <- F
  
  if (real_spot_size) {
    p <- p + geom_circle(aes(x0 = sdimx, y0 = sdimy, r=55, fill=abundance), color = NA) +
          scale_fill_gradientn(name = "Relative\nAbunance",
                               colours=c("blue", "white", "red"),
                               values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper)))
  } else {
    p <- p + geom_point(aes(color=abundance), size=.05) + 
        scale_color_gradientn(name = "Relative\nAbunance",
                              colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
                              values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper)))
  }
  p <- p + labs(title=ct, y=CT) + 
    facet_wrap(.~list_ID, ncol=6) + 
    coord_fixed() + 
    theme_nature() + 
    theme(panel.background=element_blank(), 
          panel.grid=element_blank(),
          axis.title.x=element_blank(), 
          axis.text=element_blank(), 
          axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
          axis.line.x = element_blank(), 
          axis.line.y = element_blank(), 
          plot.title = element_blank(), 
          legend.title = element_text(size=9, face = "plain"),
          strip.text = element_text(size=9, face = "plain"))
  
  p.list[[CT]] <- p
}
# anno.L3: 135个，每张图片8个细胞类型，总共要绘制16.875张。
# 顺序：
page1 <- c(paste0("GABA_", 0:3), paste0("Glu_", 0:3)) 
page2 <- paste0("Glu_", 4:11)
page3 <- c("Glu_12", "Astro", "Endo-Others", "Micro", "OPC", "Oligo")

L2.order <- c(page1, page2, page3)

# 统计一下每种类型总共有多少种亚型。
meta.sn <- readRDS("data_new/meta.sn.rds")
ct.cols <-meta.sn[!duplicated(meta.sn$anno.L3), c("anno.L2", "anno.L3")]

ct.cols$anno.L2 <- factor(ct.cols$anno.L2, levels=L2.order, ordered=T)
ct.cols$suffix <- as.integer(sub(".*_(\\d+$)", "\\1", ct.cols$anno.L3, perl=T))
ct.cols <- ct.cols[order(ct.cols$anno.L2, ct.cols$suffix), ]

ct.cols$anno.L3 <- make.names(ct.cols$anno.L3) # Endo-Others -> Endo.Others

# 有的细胞亚型因为doublet被去掉了，所以编号并不连续。
p.list <- p.list[ct.cols$anno.L3]

i.seq <- seq(1, 135, 8)

for (i in i.seq) {
  if (i == rev(i.seq)[1]) {
    end = 135
  } else {
    end <- i + 7
  }
  p.page1 <- patchwork::wrap_plots(p.list[i:end], ncol=1)
  ggsave(paste0("publish_new/deconvo.L3.", (i-1)/8, ".png"), p.page1, width=8.27, height=11.69, dpi = 300)
}

```
##---
## Fig. S4 a Example of an immunofluorescence image

This image was extracted from a previous PowerPoint presentation and may require further processing.

参考："C:\Users\a8799\Desktop\project\2022-10-14_mouse_spatial\subprojects\2023-07-05_image_analysis\Chuhao_Li_2023-08-16_荧光图像分析.pptx"

## Fig. S4b DAM, HOM C1q expression comparison

Reference: Csf1r expression comparison

```{r}
if (F) {
  # dhlab:
  library(Seurat)
  sobj <- readRDS("002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj.rds")
  gene_name <- c("C1qa", "C1qb", "C1qc")  # Target genes
  
  # Method 1: Using FetchData
  expr_vector <- FetchData(sobj, vars = gene_name)
  
  # dir.create("002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj_expr/")
  saveRDS(expr_vector, "002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj_expr/C1q.rds")
}

# thinkpad: 
meta.sn <- readRDS("data_new/meta.sn.rds")
gene.expr <- readRDS("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj_expr/C1q.rds")

p.list <- list()
for (gene in c("C1qa", "C1qb", "C1qc")) {
  meta.sn$gene_expr <- gene.expr[[gene]]

  # Calculate mean expression for each sample
  meta.sn.sub <- subset(meta.sn, anno.L2 == "Micro")
  gene_expr.agg <- aggregate(gene_expr~treatment+orig.ident+batch + anno.L3, FUN=mean, data=meta.sn.sub)
  gene_expr.agg <- subset(gene_expr.agg, anno.L3 %in% c("Micro_0", "Micro_1"))
  
  # Map cell type names
  mapping <- c("Micro_0"="HOM", "Micro_1"="DAM")
  gene_expr.agg$anno.L3 <- mapping[gene_expr.agg$anno.L3]
  gene_expr.agg$anno.L3 <- factor(gene_expr.agg$anno.L3, levels=c("HOM", "DAM"), ordered=T)
  
  # pair-wise t-test
  df.sub <- subset(gene_expr.agg, !grepl("WT_ctrl", orig.ident))
  
  
  p1 <- ggplot(df.sub, aes(anno.L3, gene_expr)) + 
    geom_bar(
      stat = "summary",
      fun = mean,
      linewidth = geom_linewidth,
      width=.6, 
      fill="grey",
      color="black"
    ) +
    geom_errorbar(
      stat = "summary",
      fun.data = mean_se,
      width = 0.2, 
      linewidth = axis_linewidth, 
      color="black"
    ) +
    geom_line(aes(group=orig.ident, color=treatment), linewidth=axis_linewidth) + 
    geom_point(aes(color=treatment), shape=21, size=1, stroke=geom_linewidth, fill="white") + 
    labs(y=paste0("<b>Expression of <i>", gene, "</i></b>")) +
    ylim(c(0, 2.2)) + 
    scale_color_manual(values=group.stroke) + 
    stat_compare_means(
      comparisons = list(c("HOM", "DAM")),
      method = "t.test",paired = T, 
      tip.length = signif_tip_length,
      label = "p.signif",
      family = "Arial", 
      size = signif_textsize, 
      bracket.size = signif_linewidth, 
    ) + 
    theme_nature() + 
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
          legend.position = "none", 
          axis.title.y = element_markdown())
  
  if (gene == "C1qc") {
    p1 <- p1 + theme(legend.position = "right")
  }
  
  p.list[[gene]] <- p1
}

p <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=3)

ggsave(paste0("publish_new/figS4b.pdf"), p, width=5.5, height=2.11, device=cairo_pdf)
ggsave(paste0("publish_new/figS4b.png"), p, width=5.5, height=2.11, dpi=300)
# ggsave("publish/fig5c.bar.pdf", p, device = Cairo::CairoPDF, width=2, height=2, units = "in")
```

## Fig. S4c Microglia proportion comparison across 3 groups

Bar plot comparing Microglia proportion across 3 groups

```{r}
proportionPlot <- function(cell.type, cell_level) {
  df1 <- table(meta.sn$orig.ident) # Total cells per treatment group

  # Handle different levels
  
  df2 <- as.data.frame.matrix(table(meta.sn$orig.ident, meta.sn[[cell_level]])) # Total microglia per subtype/treatment group
  
  # Relative and absolute proportions.
  for (i in names(df1)) {
    df2[i, ] <- df2[i, ] * 100 / df1[i]
  }
  
  df2$orig.ident <- row.names(df2)
  
  df2 <- melt(
    df2,
    id.vars = "orig.ident",
    variable.name = "cell_type",
    value.name = "proportion"
  )
  df2$treatment <- sub(pattern = "\\.\\d",
                       replacement = "",
                       df2$orig.ident) # Extract treatment group info
  
  rename_group <- c("WT_ctrl" = "WT-CTRL",
                    "AD_ctrl" = "5xFAD-CTRL",
                    "AD_5622" = "5xFAD-PLX")
  
  df2$treatment <- rename_group[df2$treatment]
  
  cat("debug: ", cell.type, "\n")
  if (cell.type != "All"){
    df2 <- subset(df2, grepl(cell.type, cell_type))
  }
  
  df2$treatment <- factor(
    df2$treatment,
    levels = c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX"),
    ordered = T
  )
  
  bar_width = 0.6
  bar_linewidth = geom_linewidth
  errorbar_width = 0.2
  errorbar_linewidth = axis_linewidth
  point_size = 1.5
  point_shape = 21
  point_stroke = geom_linewidth
  point_fill="white"
  
  p <- ggplot(df2, aes(treatment, proportion)) +
    geom_bar(
        aes(color=treatment, fill=treatment), 
        stat = "summary",
        fun = mean,
        linewidth = bar_linewidth,
        width = bar_width
      ) + 
      geom_errorbar(
        aes(color=treatment), 
        stat = "summary",
        fun.data = mean_se,
        width = errorbar_width, 
        linewidth = errorbar_linewidth
      ) + 
      geom_point(
        aes(color=treatment), 
        position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = jitter_width),
        size = point_size,
        shape = point_shape,
        stroke = point_stroke, 
        fill=point_fill
      ) + 
      scale_fill_manual(values = group.fill) + 
      scale_color_manual(values = group.stroke) + 
      scale_y_continuous(
        breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+  # Fix 5 major ticks
      theme_nature() + 
      theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
          legend.position = "none", 
          axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
          axis.title.y = element_markdown())+
    labs(x = "", y = "Cell Proportion (%)")
  
  if (length(unique(df2$cell_type)) > 1) {
    p <- p + facet_wrap(.~cell_type, ncol=5, scale="free_y")
  } else {
    p <- p + labs(x = "", y = paste0(cell.type, " Proportion (%)"))
  }
  p
}
```

```{r}
# fig. 4d----

meta.sn <- readRDS("data_new/meta.sn.rds")

p <- proportionPlot("Micro", "anno.L1")

p <- p + theme(legend.position = "right", legend.title = element_blank())

ggsave("publish_new/figS4c.pdf", p, width=2.6, height=1.85, device=cairo_pdf)

ggsave("publish_new/figS4c.png", p, width=2.6, height=1.85, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

## Fig. S4d C1qb and C1qc differences in ST between groups

Reference: Fig. 4f

```{r}

if (F) {
  # dhlab:
  library(Giotto)
  gobj <- readRDS("001ST/001Giotto_out/testcombo.rds")
  gene_name <- c("C1qb", "C1qc")  # Target genes
  
  # Method 1: Using FetchData
  gobj.expr <- get_expression_values(gobj, values="normalized", output="matrix")
  
  gobj.expr <- t(as.matrix(gobj.expr[gene_name, ]))
  
  # dir.create("002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj_expr/")
  
  dir.create("001ST/gene.expr/")
  saveRDS(gobj.expr, "001ST/gene.expr/C1q.rds")
}

gene.expr <- readRDS("../001ST/gene.expr/C1q.rds")
gobj.meta <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")

if (! all(gobj.meta$cell_ID == row.names(gene.expr))) stop("Column names inconsistent!")

gobj.meta <- cbind(gobj.meta, gene.expr)

p.list <- list()

for (gene in c("C1qb", "C1qc")) {
  gobj.meta$gene.expr <- gobj.meta[[gene]]
  gobj.meta.agg <- aggregate(gene.expr~treatment+brain_regions+batch, FUN=mean, data=gobj.meta)
  gobj.meta.agg <- subset(gobj.meta.agg, ! brain_regions %in% c("Lateral Ventricle", "Third Ventricle", "C12"))
  
  gobj.meta.agg$treatment <- factor(gobj.meta.agg$treatment, levels=c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX"), 
                                        ordered=T)
  
  p <- ggplot(gobj.meta.agg, aes(treatment, gene.expr, color = treatment, fill = treatment)) +
    geom_custom_barplot() + 
    stat_compare_means(
      comparisons = list(c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-CTRL"), c("5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX")),
      method = "t.test",
      tip.length = signif_tip_length,
      label = "p.signif",
      family = "Arial", 
      size = signif_textsize, 
      bracket.size = axis_linewidth
    ) +
    labs(x = "", y = paste0("<b><i>", gene, "</i> expression<br>(Log-normalized counts)</b>")) +
    facet_wrap(. ~ brain_regions, ncol = 5) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(NA, max(gobj.meta.agg[["gene.expr"]]) * 1.3))
  
  p.list[[gene]] <- p
}

p <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=1)

ggsave("publish_new/figS4d.pdf", p, width=5.5, height=2.5*2, device=cairo_pdf)
ggsave("publish_new/figS4d.png", p, width=5.5, height=2.5*2, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

## Fig. S4e C1qa spatial plot

```{r}

meta.st <- readRDS("data/meta.st.rds")

df1 <- meta.st[, c("treatment",
                   "brain_regions",
                   "list_ID",
                   "sdimx",
                   "sdimy",
                   "UMAP_1",
                   "UMAP_2")]

gene_symbol <- "C1qa"

df1$gene.expr <- getSTGeneExpression(gene_symbol)

df1 <- subset(df1, brain_regions != "C12") # Table length can only be changed after reading data.

df1$treatment <- factor(
  df1$treatment,
  levels = names(group.fill),
  ordered = T
)

plot_gene_spatial2 <- function(
    df1,
    brain.region = "All",
    gene_symbol
) {
  
  if (brain.region == "All") {
    brain.region = unique(df1$brain_regions)
  }
  
  SUMM <- boxplot(df1$gene.expr, plot = F)$stats
  upper <- SUMM[5]
  middle <- SUMM[3]
  lower <- SUMM[1]
  df1$gene.expr[df1$gene.expr > upper] <- upper
  df1$gene.expr[df1$gene.expr < lower] <- lower
  
  # ---- Filter expression based on brain region, set others to NA for grey display ----
  df1$gene.expr <- ifelse(df1$brain_regions %in% brain.region, df1$gene.expr, NA)
  df1$list_ID <- factor(df1$list_ID, 
                        levels=c("WT-CTRL-1", 
                                 "WT-CTRL-2", 
                                 "5xFAD-CTRL-1", 
                                 "5xFAD-CTRL-2", 
                                 "5xFAD-PLX-1", 
                                 "5xFAD-PLX-2"), 
                        ordered=T)
  
  # ---- Base layers ----
  p <- ggplot(df1, aes(x = sdimx, y = sdimy)) +
    geom_point(aes(color=gene.expr), size=0.65, stroke = 0) +
    scale_color_gradientn(name="Expression", 
                          colours=c("blue", "white", "red"), 
                          values=scales::rescale(c(lower, middle, upper))) + 
    facet_wrap(~list_ID, ncol=2,scales = "free") + 
    labs(title=gene_symbol) + 
    theme_nature() + 
    theme(panel.background=element_blank(), 
          panel.grid=element_blank(),
          axis.title=element_blank(), 
          axis.text=element_blank(), 
          axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
          axis.line.x = element_blank(), 
          axis.line.y = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5),
          legend.position = "bottom", 
          legend.direction = "horizontal", 
          legend.key.width = unit(8, "mm"), 
          legend.key.height = unit(3, "mm"),
          strip.text = element_text(size = 9), 
          legend.title = element_text(size = 8, vjust = 0.8),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 8)
    )
  
  return(p)
}

p <- plot_gene_spatial2(df1, brain.region = "All", gene_symbol)

ggsave("./publish_new/FigS.C1qa.png", p, width=2.7, height=5.2, dpi=300)
```

## Fig. S5 Mbp immuno

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(reshape2)
data1 <- read_excel("source_data/MBP统计数据.xlsx", sheet = 1)
data2 <- read_excel("source_data/MBP统计数据.xlsx", sheet = 2)

data1 <- melt(data1, variable.name = "treatment")
data1$Brain_region <- "Hippocampus"
data2 <- melt(data2, variable.name = "treatment")
data2$Brain_region <- "Olfactory cortical area"

data.long <- rbind(data1, data2)
data.long <- na.omit(data.long)

data.long$treatment <- factor(data.long$treatment, 
                         levels=names(group.fill), 
                         ordered=T)

upper.limit <- max(data.long$value)*1.3

p <- ggplot(data.long, aes(treatment, value, fill=treatment, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_custom_barplot() + 
   stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-CTRL"), 
                       c("5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX"), 
                       c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX")),
    method = "t.test",
    tip.length = signif_tip_length,
    label = "p.signif",
    family = "Arial", 
    size = signif_textsize, 
    bracket.size = signif_linewidth
  ) + 
  facet_wrap(.~Brain_region) + 
  labs(y="Relative MBP fluorescence<br>intensity (%)") + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_comma()) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(NA, upper.limit)) + 
  # theme(legend.position = "right", legend.title = element_blank())
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal", legend.title = element_blank())
  
ggsave("publish_new/figS5.Mbp_fluo.pdf", p, width=3.3, height=2.26, device=cairo_pdf)
ggsave("publish_new/figS5.Mbp_fluo.png", p, width=3.3, height=2.26, dpi=300)


```


# Key Data

## Microglia depletion rate

```{r}
# SN
meta.sn <- readRDS("./data_new/meta.sn.rds")

df1 <- table(meta.sn$orig.ident)

meta.sn.sub <- subset(meta.sn, anno.L3 %in% c("Micro_0", "Micro_1"))
df2 <- as.data.frame.matrix(table(meta.sn.sub$orig.ident, meta.sn.sub$anno.L3))
df2$treatment <- sub("\\.\\d$", "", row.names(df2))
df2$batch <-  sapply(strsplit(row.names(df2), ".", fixed = T), "[", 2)
df2 <- subset(df2, treatment != "WT_ctrl")

df2$HOM.prop <- df2$Micro_0 / df2$total_cell
library(reshape2)

df3 <- dcast(batch~treatment, value.var = "HOM.prop", data=df2)
df3$HOM_depletion_rate <- (df3$AD_ctrl - df3$AD_5622) / df3$AD_ctrl

mean_se(df3$HOM_depletion_rate)
#           y       ymin      ymax
# 1 0.3519336 -0.1168774 0.8207446

# ST
meta.st <- readRDS("./data/meta.st.rds")

collector <- list()

for (gene in c("C1qa", "Trem2", "P2ry12")) {
  gene.expr <- getSTGeneListExpression(gene)
  meta.st$gene.expr <- as.vector(gene.expr)
  meta.agg <- aggregate(gene.expr~treatment+batch, FUN=mean, data=meta.st)
  meta.agg <- subset(meta.agg, treatment != "WT-CTRL")
  
  meta.agg.w <- dcast(batch ~ treatment, value.var="gene.expr", data=meta.agg)
  meta.agg.w$depletion_rate <- (meta.agg.w$`5xFAD-CTRL` - meta.agg.w$`5xFAD-PLX`) / meta.agg.w$`5xFAD-CTRL`
  collector[[gene]] <- meta.agg.w
}

collector

# $C1qa
#   batch 5xFAD-CTRL 5xFAD-PLX depletion_rate
# 1     1   1.062093  0.544263      0.4875560
# 2     2   1.002652  0.438058      0.5631005
# 
# $Trem2
#   batch 5xFAD-CTRL 5xFAD-PLX depletion_rate
# 1     1  0.6078516 0.3277995      0.4607244
# 2     2  0.5840734 0.2894918      0.5043571
# 
# $P2ry12
#   batch 5xFAD-CTRL  5xFAD-PLX depletion_rate
# 1     1  0.2444693 0.07336389      0.6999055
# 2     2  0.2071059 0.04730592      0.7715858

sem <- function(x, na.rm = FALSE) {
  if (na.rm) x <- na.omit(x)
  sd(x) / sqrt(length(x))
}

a <- round(mean(collector$Trem2$depletion_rate) * 100, 1)
a.sem <- round(sem(collector$Trem2$depletion_rate) * 100, 1)

b <- round(mean(collector$P2ry12$depletion_rate) * 100, 1)
b.sem <- round(sem(collector$P2ry12$depletion_rate) * 100, 1)

out <- paste0("We observed a lower depletion rate of DAM (", a, "%±", a.sem, "%) compared to HOM (", b, "%±", b.sem, "%) in response to PLX5622 treatment at the mid-disease stage. ")

print(out)
```

```
[1] "We observed a lower depletion rate of DAM (48.3%±2.2%) compared to HOM (73.6%±3.6%) in response to PLX5622 treatment at the mid-disease stage. "
```

## OXPHOS gene counts

```{r}
#C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622/003ST_DEGs_spot_enrichment.Rmd#number-of-oxphos-genes

# OXPHOS genes in Mouse.MitoCarta3.0: 
mt_db <- readxl::read_excel("../001ST/000data/Mouse.MitoCarta3.0.xls", sheet=2)

mt_db.oxphos <- subset(mt_db, grepl("^OXPHOS", MitoCarta3.0_MitoPathways))

n_oxphos.1 <- length(unique(mt_db.oxphos$Symbol))
# [1] 158

# OXPHOS genes(GO:0006119) in MGI: 
# https://www.informatics.jax.org/go/term/GO:0006119
mgi_db <- readxl::read_excel("C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/database/MGI/GO0006119.xlsx")
n_oxphos.2 <- unique(mgi_db$Symbol)
length(n_oxphos.2)
# 146
writeLines(n_oxphos.2, "C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/database/MGI/GO0006119.genelist.txt")

# Compare MGI and MitoCarta OXPHOS genes:
# Intersection
n_oxphos.3 <- intersect(mgi_db$Symbol, mt_db.oxphos$Symbol)
length(n_oxphos.3)
# 83
# View(subset(mt_db, Symbol %in% n_oxphos.3))

# MGI specific
n_oxphos.4 <- setdiff(mgi_db$Symbol, mt_db.oxphos$Symbol)
# View(subset(mt_db, Symbol %in% n_oxphos.4))

# MitoCarta specific
n_oxphos.5 <- setdiff(mt_db.oxphos$Symbol, mgi_db$Symbol)
# View(subset(mt_db, Symbol %in% n_oxphos.5))

# responsive OXPHOS genes: 
st.DEGs <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/st.DEGs.csv", row.names=1)
st.DEGs.sub <- subset(st.DEGs, comparison == "PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl")
responsive <- unique(st.DEGs.sub$gene)
responsive_oxphos <- intersect(unique(mgi_db$Symbol), responsive)
length(responsive_oxphos) # 33
writeLines(responsive_oxphos, "../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/responsive_oxphos.list")

responsive.up <- unique(subset(st.DEGs.sub, avg_log2FC > 0)$gene)
responsive_oxphos.up <- intersect(unique(mgi_db$Symbol), responsive.up)
length(responsive_oxphos.up)
# [1] 28

# subset(mt_db, Symbol %in% responsive_oxphos.up)

# non-responsive OXPHOS genes: 
non_responsive_oxphos <- setdiff(n_oxphos.2, responsive_oxphos)
writeLines(non_responsive_oxphos, "../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/non_responsive_oxphos.list")

df <- data.frame(V1=c("responsive_oxphos", "non_responsive_oxphos"), 
           V2=c(paste(responsive_oxphos, collapse=","), paste(non_responsive_oxphos, collapse = ",")))

write.table(df, "../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/oxphos_genes.multiList.txt", row.names = F, col.names = F, quote=F, sep="\t")

# rescued OXPHOS genes:
rescued.df <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/st.DEGs.rescued.csv", row.names=1)
rescued.genes <- unique(rescued.df$gene)
rescued_oxphos <- intersect(unique(mgi_db$Symbol), rescued.genes)
length(rescued_oxphos)
# [1] 23

# mt-encoded OXPHOS genes: 
mt_oxphos <- grep("^mt-", rescued_oxphos, value=T)

mt_oxphos
# [1] "mt-Atp6" "mt-Atp8" "mt-Co1"  "mt-Co2"  "mt-Co3"  "mt-Cytb" "mt-Nd1"  "mt-Nd2"  "mt-Nd3"  "mt-Nd4"  "mt-Nd4l" "mt-Nd5"

length(mt_oxphos)
# 12

paste0("92 rescued genes were upregulated in 5xFAD-PLX mice compared with 5xFAD-CTRL mice (Supplementary Table 4). Notably, ", length(rescued_oxphos), " of them were associated with the oxidative phosphorylation (OXPHOS) pathway (GO:0006119) and formed a densely connected module (Fig. 4 Ext. d; Supplementary Table 4), including Ndufa3, Ndufa5, mt-Co2, Cox7c, mt-Nd1, mt-Nd2, mt-Nd3, mt-Nd4, mt-Nd4l, and mt-Nd5 (Fig. 4 Ext. e)")

paste0("Our ST profiling confirmed downregulation of the OXPHOS pathway in AD mice and revealed that microglial depletion at the mid-disease stage upregulated expression of ", length(responsive_oxphos.up), " OXPHOS genes in AD mouse brain (Fig. 4 Ext. d; Fig. 6a).")

paste0("Notably, microglial depletion upregulated the expression of ", length(mt_oxphos), " mtOXPHOS genes, representing ", round(length(mt_oxphos)*100/14, 2), "% of the 14 human mitochondrial protein-coding genes (Fig. 6b).")

```

```
[1] "92 rescued genes were upregulated in 5xFAD-PLX mice compared with 5xFAD-CTRL mice (Supplementary Table 4). Notably, 23 of them were associated with the oxidative phosphorylation (OXPHOS) pathway (GO:0006119) and formed a densely connected module (Fig. 4 Ext. d; Supplementary Table 4), including Ndufa3, Ndufa5, mt-Co2, Cox7c, mt-Nd1, mt-Nd2, mt-Nd3, mt-Nd4, mt-Nd4l, and mt-Nd5 (Fig. 4 Ext. e)"

[1] "Our ST profiling confirmed downregulation of the OXPHOS pathway in AD mice and revealed that microglial depletion at the mid-disease stage upregulated expression of 28 OXPHOS genes in AD mouse brain (Fig. 4 Ext. d; Fig. 6a)."

[1] "Notably, microglial depletion upregulated the expression of 12 mtOXPHOS genes, representing 85.71% of the 14 human mitochondrial protein-coding genes (Fig. 6b)."
```

# Backup Image

## Fig. S Human Oligo Proportions

```{r}

remotes::install_github("rpolicastro/scProportionTest")

load('../002SC/human_oligo/Human.Prop_test.Rdata')

library(scProportionTest)

prop_test_syn53366818@results$permutation <- subset(prop_test_syn53366818@results$permutation,
                                                    clusters %in% c("OPC", "Oli"))
p1 <- permutation_plot(prop_test_syn53366818,log2FD_threshold = 0.1)+
  ggtitle('SYN53366818')+
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom',plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), legend.direction = "vertical")


prop_test_syn52383412@results$permutation <- subset(prop_test_syn52383412@results$permutation,
                                                    clusters %in% c("OPC", "Oli"))
p2 <- permutation_plot(prop_test_syn52383412,log2FD_threshold = 0.1)+
  ggtitle('SYN52383412')+
  theme(legend.position = 'none',plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

prop_test_syn52293442@results$permutation <- subset(prop_test_syn52293442@results$permutation,
                                                    clusters %in% c("OPC", "Oligo"))
p3 <- permutation_plot(prop_test_syn52293442,log2FD_threshold = 0.1)+
  ggtitle('SYN52293442')+
  theme(legend.position = 'none',plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

p <-  p2 / p3 / p1

ggsave("../002SC/human_oligo/Oligo_Human.Prop_test.png", p, width=3.23, height=5.2, dpi=300)

```


## Fig. S Number of oxidative phosphorylation genes

```{r}

st.DEGs <- read.csv("data/st.DEGs.csv", row.names=1)
st.DEGs <- subset(st.DEGs, ! brain_region %in% c("Third Ventricle", "Lateral Ventricle"))
st.DEGs <- subset(st.DEGs, comparison != "PLX5622_vs_WTCtrl")

library(reshape2)
# 筛选出rescued genes
df <- dcast(gene + brain_region ~ comparison, value.var = "avg_log2FC", data=st.DEGs)
df <- na.omit(df)
df.rescued <- subset(df, FADCtrl_vs_WTCtrl * PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl < 1)

length(unique(df.rescued$gene)) # 336
length(unique(subset(df.rescued, PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl < 0)$gene)) # 247
# Among the 336 rescued genes, xxx were downregulated in 5xFAD-PLX mice compared to the 5xFAD-CTRL group.

# 92 rescued genes were upregulated in 5xFAD-PLX mice compared with 5xFAD-CTRL mice.
length(unique(subset(df.rescued, PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl > 0)$gene)) # 92

# Genes involved in the oxidative phosphorylation pathway?
# 1. GO pathway。
# 2. MitoCarta3.0

# How to obtain mouse gene symbols belonging to a specific GO number?

# Download and MGI. Search for GO:0006119 in GO browser and export it as an Excel spreadsheet.
oxphos.df <- readxl::read_excel("C:\\Users\\a8799\\Desktop\\database\\MGI\\GO_term_summary_20260126_124139.xlsx")
oxphos.list <- unique(oxphos.df$Symbol)

responsive.oxphos <- subset(st.DEGs, gene %in% oxphos.list & comparison=="PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl")
length(unique(responsive.oxphos$gene)) # 33

degs.oxphos <- subset(st.DEGs, gene %in% oxphos.list)
length(unique(degs.oxphos$gene)) # 57

rescued.oxphos <- subset(df.rescued, gene %in% oxphos.list)
length(unique(rescued.oxphos$gene)) # 23
# Please classify the following genes according to the protein complex to which they belong:
# "Chchd2"  "Cox6a1"  "Cox6c"   "Cox7c"   "Cox8a"   "mt-Atp6" "mt-Atp8" "mt-Co1"  "mt-Co2"  "mt-Co3"  "mt-Cytb" "mt-Nd1"  "mt-Nd2"  "mt-Nd3"  "mt-Nd4"  "mt-Nd4l" "mt-Nd5"  "Ndufa11" "Ndufa3"  "Ndufa5"  "Ndufb4"  "Uqcr11"  "Uqcrb" 

# setdiff(degs.oxphos$gene, rescued.oxphos$gene)

out.df1 <- rescued.oxphos %>% group_by(brain_region) %>% summarise(n_rescued_oxphos_gene=n())
# # A tibble: 7 × 2
#   brain_region      n_rescued_oxphos_gene
#   <chr>                             <int>
# 1 Cortical subplate                    14
# 2 Fiber tracts                          8
# 3 Hypothalamus                         10
# 4 Isocortex                             8
# 5 Olfactory area                        8
# 6 Striatum                              9
# 7 Thalamus                             14


out.df2 <- responsive.oxphos %>% group_by(brain_region) %>% summarise(n_rescued_oxphos_gene=n())
# A tibble: 9 × 2
#   brain_region      n_rescued_oxphos_gene
#   <chr>                             <int>
# 1 Cortical subplate                    22
# 2 Fiber tracts                         11
# 3 Hippocampus                           5
# 4 Hypothalamus                         14
# 5 Isocortex                            13
# 6 Meninges                              4
# 7 Olfactory area                       27
# 8 Striatum                             17
# 9 Thalamus                             16

```

## Fig. 7 Ext. GABA SN DEGs vocanoPlot (AD vs WT)

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(ggrepel)
library(DESeq2)
library(EnhancedVolcano)

dds <- readRDS("../002SC/001Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/GABA.dds.rds")
AD_vs_WT <- results(dds, contrast = c("treatment", "AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl"))
# PL_vs_AD <- results(dds, contrast = c("treatment", "AD_5622", "AD_ctrl"))

df.sub <- filt.res(AD_vs_WT)

up <- subset(df.sub, log2FoldChange > 0)
paste(up$gene[!grepl("^Gm|Rik$", up$gene)], collapse=", ")
down <- subset(df.sub, log2FoldChange < 0)
paste(down$gene[!grepl("^Gm|Rik$", down$gene)], collapse=", ")

# We performed single-nucleus sequencing on both 5xFAD and wild-type mice, comparing GABAergic neurons from the two groups. We identified the following upregulated genes: Thy1, Ano2, Meis2, Hpgds, Apoe, St8sia3os, Epyc, Lilrb4a, Itgbl1, Lrtm1, Slc24a4, Muc15, Glp2r, Inhba, Pifo, Vmn2r2, Itga11, and the following downregulated genes: Tfap2b, Rmst, Chrm2. How can we interpret these results?

df.sub$direction <- ifelse(df.sub$log2FoldChange > 0, yes = "up", no = "down")
df.sub$gene <- row.names(df.sub)

write.csv(df.sub, "../002SC/001Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/GABA.AD_vs_WT.csv")

interested_genes <- c("Thy1", "Slc24a4", "Rmst", "Glp2r", "Itgbl1", 
                      "Itga11", "Ano2", "Meis2", "Apoe", "Hpgds", 
                      "Tfap2b", "Chrm2")

# Screening criteria：
min(abs(df.sub$log2FoldChange))
# [1] 0.4954564
# abs(lfc) > 0.4
# baseMean > 10
# padj < 0.05

p <- ggplot(df.sub, aes(log2FoldChange, -log10(padj), color=direction)) +
  geom_point() + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.4, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = -0.4, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = axis_linewidth) + 
  scale_color_manual(name="Direction", values = c("up"="red", "down"="blue")) + 
  labs(title = "GABA specific DEGs\n(5xFAD-CTRL vs WT-CTRL)") + 
  theme_nature()

p <- p + geom_text_repel(
  data = subset(df.sub, gene %in% interested_genes),
  aes(label = gene), 
  size = 7 * 0.35278,
  box.padding = 0.5,   
  point.padding = 0.3,  
  min.segment.length = 0.2,  
  max.overlaps = Inf,   
  segment.color = "grey50",  
  segment.size = 0.5,   
  direction = "both",   
  nudge_x = 0.2,      
  nudge_y = 0.2       
)

ggsave("publish_new/fig7.SN_pseudobulk_DEGs_vocano.AD_vs_WT.GABA.pdf", p, width=3.413, height=2.657, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("publish_new/fig7.SN_pseudobulk_DEGs_vocano.AD_vs_WT.GABA.png", p, width=3.413, height=2.657, dpi=300)

```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("publish_new/fig7.SN_pseudobulk_DEGs_vocano.AD_vs_WT.GABA.png")
```

## Human vs. mouse

```{r}
# 

df.metascape <- read.csv("C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622/data/st/003/enrich/PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl.GO_AllLists.csv")

# lfc 0.3, PL vs AD: 
# Oxidative phosphorylation: GO:0006119
enriched.genes <- subset(df.metascape, GO == "GO:0006119", select = "Hits", drop=T)
enriched.genes <- strsplit(enriched.genes, "|", fixed=T)
enriched.genes <- unique(unlist(enriched.genes))
writeLines(enriched.genes)
# ATP8
# COX1
# COX2
# COX3
# ND1
# ND2
# ND3
# ND4L
# ND5
# Atp5k
# CYTB
# ND4
# Ndufb1

# Glycolysis：mmu00010
# Ldha
# Pkm
# Tpi1

#--------------------------------------------------
# lfc 0：
# PL vs AD: 
df.metascape <- read.csv("data/st.DEGs.agg_PL_vs_AD.txt_custom_bg/Enrichment_GO/GO_AllLists.csv")

enriched.genes <- subset(df.metascape, GO == "GO:0006119", select = "Hits", drop=T)
enriched.genes <- strsplit(enriched.genes, "|", fixed=T)
enriched.genes <- unique(unlist(enriched.genes))
paste(enriched.genes, collapse=", ")
# Atp5me, Cox6a1, Cox6c, Cox7c, Cox8a, ATP6, ATP8, COX1, COX2, COX3, CYTB, ND1, ND2, ND3, ND4, ND4L, ND5, Ndufa3, Cox7b, Uqcr11, Ndufb4, Ndufa5, Cox6b1, Ndufb1, Uqcrb, ND6, Ndufa1, Ndufa11, Atp5pd, Ndufv2

# Glycolysis: mmu00010, WP157
enriched.genes <- subset(df.metascape, GO %in% c("mmu00010", "WP157"), select = "Hits", drop=T)
enriched.genes <- strsplit(enriched.genes, "|", fixed=T)
glycolysis.genes <- unique(unlist(enriched.genes))
paste(glycolysis.genes, collapse=", ")
# "Eno2, Ldha, Mdh2, Pkm, Tpi1, Gapdh, Got1, Got2, Gpi1, Mdh1, Pfkl, Pgam1, Pgk1, Pfkp"

# AD vs WT: 
df.AD_WT <- read.csv("data/st.DEGs.agg_AD_vs_WT.txt_custom_bg/Enrichment_GO/GO_AllLists.csv")
df.AD_wT.sub <- enriched.genes <- subset(df.AD_WT, GO == "GO:0006119")

df.AD_wT.sub <- enriched.genes <- subset(df.AD_WT, GO %in% c("mmu00010", "WP157"))

# Examine the changes in genes downregulated in the glycolysis pathway in PL vs AD in AD vs WT

st.DEGs <- read.csv("data/st.DEGs.csv", row.names=1)
subset(st.DEGs, gene %in% glycolysis.genes & comparison == "PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl")
subset(st.DEGs, gene %in% glycolysis.genes & comparison == "FADCtrl_vs_WTCtrl")

# Pkm, Eno2 is increased in AD vs WT.
```

# supplementary tables

## cell count Level 1

1. celltype ~ treatment
2. celltype ~ orig.ident

```{r}

library(dplyr)

meta.sn <- readRDS("data_new/meta.sn.rds")

df.list <- list()

for (LEVEL in c("anno.L1", "anno.L2", "anno.L3")) {
  
  L1.total <- meta.sn %>% group_by(.data[[LEVEL]]) %>% summarise(total_count=n())

  L1.groupby.treatment <- meta.sn %>% 
    group_by(.data[[LEVEL]], treatment) %>% 
    summarise(Count=n()) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from="treatment", values_from = "Count")
    
  L1.groupby.sample <- meta.sn %>% 
    group_by(.data[[LEVEL]], orig.ident) %>% 
    summarise(Count=n()) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from="orig.ident", values_from = "Count")
  
  df.L1 <- L1.total %>% inner_join(L1.groupby.treatment, by = LEVEL) %>%
    inner_join(L1.groupby.sample, by = LEVEL) 
  
  colnames(df.L1) <- c("cell_type", colnames(df.L1)[-1])
  
  # 排序。
  if (LEVEL == "anno.L1") {
    cell.order <- c("GABA", "Glu", "Astro", "Endo-Others", "Micro", "OPC", "Oligo")
  } else if (LEVEL == "anno.L2") {
    page1 <- c(paste0("GABA_", 0:3), paste0("Glu_", 0:3)) 
    page2 <- paste0("Glu_", 4:11)
    page3 <- c("Glu_12", "Astro", "Endo-Others", "Micro", "OPC", "Oligo")
    cell.order <- c(page1, page2, page3)
  } else {
    page1 <- c(paste0("GABA_", 0:3), paste0("Glu_", 0:3)) 
    page2 <- paste0("Glu_", 4:11)
    page3 <- c("Glu_12", "Astro", "Endo-Others", "Micro", "OPC", "Oligo")
    L2.order <- c(page1, page2, page3)
    ct.cols <-meta.sn[!duplicated(meta.sn$anno.L3), c("anno.L2", "anno.L3")]
    ct.cols$anno.L2 <- factor(ct.cols$anno.L2, levels=L2.order, ordered=T)
    ct.cols$suffix <- as.integer(sub(".*_(\\d+$)", "\\1", ct.cols$anno.L3, perl=T))
    ct.cols <- ct.cols[order(ct.cols$anno.L2, ct.cols$suffix), ]
    cell.order <- ct.cols$anno.L3
  }
  
  df.L1$cell_type <- factor(df.L1$cell_type, levels=cell.order, ordered=T)
  df.L1 <- df.L1[order(df.L1$cell_type), ]
  
  df.list[[LEVEL]] <- df.L1
}

df.merged <- Reduce(rbind, df.list)

write.csv(df.merged, "publish_new/tab3.csv")

```

## SN cluster markers

```{r}
LEVELs <- c("anno.L1", "anno.L2")
paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/", LEVEL, ".FindAllMarkers.csv")

# anno.L3
cts <- unique(meta.sn$anno.L2)
paste0("004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/cluster.L3/", ct, ".marker.csv")

# 可视化GABA_0 ~ GABA_3。marker
```

## rescued genes table

gene name, up/down, brain_region(log2fc), Other annotation information

```{r}

st.DEGs <- read.csv("data/st.DEGs.csv", row.names=1)

st.DEGs <- subset(st.DEGs, ! brain_region %in% c("Third Ventricle", "Lateral Ventricle"))
st.DEGs <- subset(st.DEGs, comparison != "PLX5622_vs_WTCtrl")

library(reshape2)
df <- dcast(gene + brain_region ~ comparison, value.var = "avg_log2FC", data=st.DEGs)
df <- na.omit(df)
df.rescued <- subset(df, FADCtrl_vs_WTCtrl * PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl < 1)


library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)

Abeta.merged <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/delta_Abeta.csv", row.names=1)
br.order <- rev(Abeta.merged$brain_region)
br.order <- br.order[!grepl("Ventricle", br.order)]


sub_dat <- subset(st.DEGs, gene %in% df.rescued$gene)

available_regions <- unique(sub_dat$brain_region)
sorted_regions <- br.order[br.order %in% available_regions]

all_genes <- unique(sub_dat$gene)

get_matrix <- function(comp_name) {
  tmp <- dcast(subset(sub_dat, comparison == comp_name), 
               gene ~ brain_region, value.var = "avg_log2FC", fill = 0)
  rownames(tmp) <- tmp$gene
  tmp <- tmp[, -1]
  
  res <- matrix(0, nrow = length(all_genes), ncol = length(sorted_regions), 
                dimnames = list(all_genes, sorted_regions)) # 注意这里用了 sorted_regions
  
  common_g <- intersect(rownames(tmp), all_genes)
  common_r <- intersect(colnames(tmp), sorted_regions)
  
  if(length(common_g) > 0 && length(common_r) > 0){
    res[common_g, common_r] <- as.matrix(tmp[common_g, common_r])
  }
  
  res <- res[, sorted_regions, drop=FALSE]
  return(res)
}

mat_AD <- get_matrix("FADCtrl_vs_WTCtrl")
mat_PL <- get_matrix("PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl")


mat_final <- cbind(mat_AD, mat_PL)

colnames(mat_final) <- c(paste0("AD_", sorted_regions), paste0("PL_", sorted_regions))

mat_final <- mat_final[gene_hclust$order, ]

write.csv(mat_final, "publish_new/tab5.csv")

# adjust format and save to publish_new/tab5.xlsx
```
